```{r}
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_attempts_bee)
t50_times_S_nicchoice_attempts$Behaviour <- "Attempts"
t50_times_S_nicchoice_attempts$Treatment <- "Nic_choice"
t50_times_S_nicchoice_attempts_ <- t50_times_S_nicchoice_attempts %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_attempts_bee)
t50_times_nicchoice_attempts <- rbind(t50_times_N_nicchoice_attempts_, t50_times_S_nicchoice_attempts_)

t50_times_N_nicchoice_duration$Behaviour <- "Duration"
t50_times_N_nicchoice_duration$Treatment <- "Nic_choice"
t50_times_N_nicchoice_duration_ <- t50_times_N_nicchoice_duration %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee)
t50_times_S_nicchoice_duration$Behaviour <- "Duration"
t50_times_S_nicchoice_duration$Treatment <- "Nic_choice"
t50_times_S_nicchoice_duration_ <- t50_times_S_nicchoice_duration %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee)
t50_times_nicchoice_duration <- rbind(t50_times_N_nicchoice_duration_, t50_times_S_nicchoice_duration_)

t50_times_S_succhoice_attempts$Behaviour <- "Attempts"
t50_times_S_succhoice_attempts$Treatment <- "Suc_choice"
t50_times_S_succhoice_attempts_ <- t50_times_S_succhoice_attempts %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_attempts_bee)
t50_times_N_succhoice_attempts$Behaviour <- "Attempts"
t50_times_N_succhoice_attempts$Treatment <- "Suc_choice"
t50_times_N_succhoice_attempts_ <- t50_times_N_succhoice_attempts %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_attempts_bee)
t50_times_succhoice_attempts <- rbind(t50_times_N_succhoice_attempts_, t50_times_S_succhoice_attempts_)

t50_times_S_succhoice_duration$Behaviour <- "Duration"
t50_times_S_succhoice_duration$Treatment <- "Suc_choice"
t50_times_S_succhoice_duration_ <- t50_times_S_succhoice_duration %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee)
t50_times_N_succhoice_duration$Behaviour <- "Duration"
t50_times_N_succhoice_duration$Treatment <- "Suc_choice"
t50_times_N_succhoice_duration_ <- t50_times_N_succhoice_duration %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee)
t50_times_succhoice_duration <- rbind(t50_times_N_succhoice_duration_, t50_times_S_succhoice_duration_)
```

```{r}
t50_times_nicchoice <- 
  t50_times_nicchoice_duration %>%
  # Rename variables so they stay distinct after joining
  dplyr::rename(time_50pct_duration = time_50pct) %>%
  left_join(
    t50_times_nicchoice_attempts %>%
      dplyr::rename(time_50pct_attempts = time_50pct),
    by = c("bee_ID", "Treatment", "Solution"))

t50_times_succhoice <- 
  t50_times_succhoice_duration %>%
  # Rename variables so they stay distinct after joining
  dplyr::rename(time_50pct_duration = time_50pct) %>%
  left_join(
    t50_times_succhoice_attempts %>%
      dplyr::rename(time_50pct_attempts = time_50pct),
    by = c("bee_ID", "Treatment", "Solution"))

all_choice_t50_times <- rbind(t50_times_nicchoice, t50_times_succhoice)
```

Duration total
```{r}
all_choice_t50_times$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_sec <- all_choice_t50_times$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee*60
all_choice_t50_times$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_sec <- as.numeric(all_choice_t50_times$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_sec)
all_choice_t50_times$Treatment<- as.factor(all_choice_t50_times$Treatment)
all_choice_t50_times$Solution <- factor(all_choice_t50_times$Solution, levels = c("S", "N"))

lmm_duration_total <- lmer(Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_sec ~ Solution*Treatment + (1|bee_ID),
                       data = all_choice_t50_times)
summary(lmm_duration_total)
anova(lmm_duration_total)
car::Anova(lmm_duration_total)

lmm_duration_total_red <- lmer(Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_sec ~ Solution+Treatment + (1|bee_ID),
                       data = all_choice_t50_times)
summary(lmm_duration_total_red)
anova(lmm_duration_total_red)
car::Anova(lmm_duration_total_red)

emm_durationtotal <- emmeans(lmm_duration_total, ~ Solution | Treatment)
emm_durationtotal_pairs <- pairs(emm_durationtotal, adjust = "none", reverse = TRUE)
emm_durationtotal_pairs
```

Duration E50
```{r}
lmm_duration_E50 <- lmer(time_50pct_duration ~ Solution*Treatment + (1|bee_ID),
                       data = all_choice_t50_times)
summary(lmm_duration_E50)
anova(lmm_duration_E50)
car::Anova(lmm_duration_E50)
#Diagnostics show fine!!

lmm_duration_E50_red <- lmer(time_50pct_duration ~ Solution+Treatment + (1|bee_ID),
                       data = all_choice_t50_times)
summary(lmm_duration_E50_red)
anova(lmm_duration_E50_red)

emm_durationE50 <- emmeans(lmm_duration_E50, ~ Solution | Treatment)
emm_durationE50_pairs <- pairs(emm_durationE50, adjust = "none", reverse = TRUE)
emm_durationE50_pairs
```

Attempts total
```{r}
lmm_attempts_total <- lmer(Cumulative_attempts_bee ~ Solution*Treatment + (1|bee_ID),
                       data = all_choice_t50_times)
summary(lmm_attempts_total)
anova(lmm_attempts_total)
car::Anova(lmm_attempts_total)

lmm_attempts_total_red <- lmer(Cumulative_attempts_bee ~ Solution+Treatment + (1|bee_ID),
                       data = all_choice_t50_times)
summary(lmm_attempts_total_red)
anova(lmm_attempts_total_red)
car::Anova(lmm_attempts_total_red)

emm_attemptstotal <- emmeans(lmm_attempts_total, ~ Solution | Treatment)
pairs(emm_attemptstotal, adjust = "none", reverse = TRUE)
emm_attemptstotal_pairs <- pairs(emm_attemptstotal, adjust = "none", reverse = TRUE)
```

Attempts E50
```{r}
lmm_attempts_E50 <- lmer(time_50pct_attempts ~ Solution*Treatment + (1|bee_ID),
                       data = all_choice_t50_times)
summary(lmm_attempts_E50)
anova(lmm_attempts_E50)
car::Anova(lmm_attempts_E50)
#Diagnostics show fine!!

lmm_attempts_E50_red <- lmer(time_50pct_attempts ~ Solution+Treatment + (1|bee_ID),
                       data = all_choice_t50_times)
summary(lmm_attempts_E50_red)
anova(lmm_attempts_E50_red)
car::Anova(lmm_attempts_E50_red)

emm_attemptsE50 <- emmeans(lmm_attempts_E50, ~ Solution | Treatment)
pairs(emm_attemptsE50, adjust = "none", reverse = TRUE)
emm_attemptsE50_pairs <- pairs(emm_attemptsE50, adjust = "none", reverse = TRUE)
```

Adjusted pvals
```{r}
pvals <- c(
  0.1518,
  0.6545,
  0.0016,
  0.0042,
  0.1988,
  0.6075,
  0.0136,
  0.0668)

pvals_nochoice <- c(0.6598, 0.5621, 0.4732, 0.5314)

pvals <- c(
  0.1518,
  0.1988,
  0.0016,
  0.0136,
  0.6545,
  0.6075,
  0.0042,
  0.0668,
  0.6598, 0.5621, 0.4732, 0.5314)

p.adjust(pvals, method = "fdr")
```

# NO CHOICE

Work out the average cumulative trajectory from all the individual timestamped cumulative bouts
Do this by time binning the bouts, then finding the max cumulative per bee measurement within each (cumulative duration, sips, and attempts)
```{r}
binned_data_duration <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "Nic_nochoice" & all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Time_hrs <=24),] %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Time_hrs, Solution, seconds_fed, sip_frequency, mean_inter_sip_interval, Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Time_bin = cut_width(Time_hrs, width = 1, boundary = 0)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin, bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    max_total_duration = max(Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_sips = max(Cumulative_sips_overall_bee),
    av_sipfreq = mean(sip_frequency, na.rm = TRUE),
    number_feedingattempts = n(),
    av_inter_sip_interval = mean(mean_inter_sip_interval, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")
```

Fill in missing cumulative entries (if no bouts occurred for a given bee in a given time bin, add a row to the dataframe with 0s for the behaviours)
```{r}
# Create a reference grid of all combinations
bee_time_solution_grid <- binned_data_duration %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Time_bin, Solution)

# Expand to all combinations of bee_ID x Time_bin x Solution
full_data <- binned_data_duration %>%
  distinct(bee_ID) %>%
  crossing(
    Time_bin = unique(binned_data_duration$Time_bin),
    Solution = unique(binned_data_duration$Solution))

# Join original data into full grid
filled_data <- full_data %>%
  left_join(binned_data_duration, by = c("bee_ID", "Time_bin", "Solution")) %>%
  # Order for fill to work properly
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, Solution, Time_bin) %>%
  # Fill missing cumulative durations forward within each bee + solution
  group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_total_duration, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_sips, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(number_feedingattempts, .direction = "down") %>%
  # If it starts with missing (i.e., first bin), set to 0
  dplyr::mutate(max_total_duration = replace_na(max_total_duration, 0),
         max_sips = replace_na(max_sips, 0),
         number_feedingattempts = replace_na(number_feedingattempts, 0)) %>%
   # Step 1: lag previous total duration
  dplyr::mutate(prev_duration = lag(max_total_duration, default = 0),
                # Step 2: check if it increased
                new_attempt = if_else(max_total_duration > prev_duration, 1, 0),
                # Step 3: cumulative count only when duration increases
                cumulative_feedingattempts = cumsum(if_else(new_attempt == 1, number_feedingattempts, 0))) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(bee_ID) & bee_ID != "NA_NA") %>%
  ungroup()
```

Average cumulative duration, sips, and attempts within time bins and solutions
```{r}
binned_data_summary <- filled_data %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Time_bin_str = as.character(Time_bin),
    Time_bin_upper = as.numeric(sub(".*,(.*)\\)|.*,(.*)\\]", "\\1\\2", Time_bin_str)))

binned_data_summary <- binned_data_summary %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin_upper, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(av_cumulative_duration = mean(max_total_duration),
                   av_cumulative_sips = mean(max_sips),
                   av_sip_frequency = mean(av_sipfreq, na.rm = TRUE),
                   av_cumulative_attempts = mean(cumulative_feedingattempts),
                   av_ISI = mean(av_inter_sip_interval),
                   .groups = "drop")
  
new_row <- data.frame(
  Time_bin_upper = 0,
  Solution = c("S1", "S2"),  # Add both solutions for Time_bin = 0
  av_cumulative_duration = 0,
  av_cumulative_sips = 0,
  av_cumulative_attempts = 0,
  av_sip_frequency = 0,
  av_ISI = 0)

binned_data_summary <- bind_rows(binned_data_summary, new_row) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper)

binned_data_summary <- binned_data_summary %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper) %>%  # Ensure the data is ordered by Solution and Time_bin_upper
  dplyr::group_by(Solution) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    av_duration_change = av_cumulative_duration - lag(av_cumulative_duration), #Do this for rate analysis 
    av_sips_change = av_cumulative_sips - lag(av_cumulative_sips),
    av_attempts_change = av_cumulative_attempts - lag(av_cumulative_attempts)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(av_duration_change = replace_na(av_duration_change, 0),
                av_sips_change = replace_na(av_sips_change, 0),
                av_attempts_change = replace_na(av_attempts_change, 0)) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
# Set seed for reproducibility
set.seed(123)

# Define your cumulative time series data (example)
time_series_S2_duration <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "S2"),]$av_duration_change
# Number of bootstrap samples
num_samples <- 1000

# Run the bootstrap function
boot_samples <- bootstrap_time_series(time_series_S2_duration, num_samples)

# Calculate the mean and 95% confidence intervals for each time point
boot_means <- apply(boot_samples, 2, mean)
boot_se <- apply(boot_samples, 2, sd)  # Standard deviation as SE
boot_ci_lower <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025))
boot_ci_upper <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975))

# Annotate the original data with the error (lower and upper CI)
annotated_data_duration <- data.frame(
  Time = 1:length(time_series_S2_duration),
  Cumulative = time_series_S2_duration,
  Boot_Mean = boot_means,
  SE = boot_se,
  CI_Lower = boot_ci_lower,
  CI_Upper = boot_ci_upper)

annotated_data_duration$Actual_cumulative <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "S2"),]$av_cumulative_duration
annotated_data_duration$Solution <- "S2"


# Define your cumulative time series data (example)
time_series_S1_duration <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "S1"),]$av_duration_change
# Run the bootstrap function
boot_samples <- bootstrap_time_series(time_series_S1_duration, num_samples)
# Calculate the mean and 95% confidence intervals for each time point
boot_means <- apply(boot_samples, 2, mean)
boot_se <- apply(boot_samples, 2, sd)  # Standard deviation as SE
boot_ci_lower <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025))
boot_ci_upper <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975))
# Annotate the original data with the error (lower and upper CI)
annotated_data_duration2 <- data.frame(
  Time = 1:length(time_series_S1_duration),
  Cumulative = time_series_S1_duration,
  Boot_Mean = boot_means,
  SE = boot_se,
  CI_Lower = boot_ci_lower,
  CI_Upper = boot_ci_upper)
annotated_data_duration2$Actual_cumulative <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "S1"),]$av_cumulative_duration
annotated_data_duration2$Solution <- "S1"
```

```{r}
# Add 0,0
S1_origin_row <- data.frame(
  Time = 0,
  Cumulative = 0,
  Boot_Mean = NA,
  SE = 0,
  CI_Lower = NA,
  CI_Upper = NA,
  Actual_cumulative = 0,
  Solution = "S1",
  Time_min = 0)
S2_origin_row <- data.frame(
  Time = 0,
  Cumulative = 0,
  Boot_Mean = NA,
  SE = 0,
  CI_Lower = NA,
  CI_Upper = NA,
  Actual_cumulative = 0,
  Solution = "S2",
  Time_min = 0)
```

```{r}
Cumulative_data_error_duration <- rbind(annotated_data_duration, annotated_data_duration2)
Cumulative_data_error_duration$Time_min <- (Cumulative_data_error_duration$Time * 60)-60

# Add the new row to the dataframe
Cumulative_data_error_duration <- rbind(Cumulative_data_error_duration, S2_origin_row, S1_origin_row)
Cumulative_data_error_duration$Time_hrs <- Cumulative_data_error_duration$Time_min/60

cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_nicnochoice <- ggplot(Cumulative_data_error_duration, aes(x = Time_hrs, y = Actual_cumulative, color = Solution, group = Solution)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) + theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),  # x axis label size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),  # y axis label size
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold",)) + 
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = Actual_cumulative-SE, ymax = Actual_cumulative+SE, fill = Solution), alpha = 0.4, color = NA) +
  labs(y = "Mean cumulative time feeding per bee (s)", x = "Time in experiment (hours)") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("S2" = "#5dade2", "S1" = "#5dade2")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("S2" = "#5dade2", "S1" = "#5dade2")) +  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 24, by = 4)) + ylim(c(0,300))
cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_nicnochoice
```

Find the mean T50 point (target_time_N <- mean(all_t50_times[which(all_t50_times$Solution == "N"),]$time_50pct)/60))

Go back to the cumulative dataframe (subset by focal treatment)
```{r}
cumulative_analysis_data_S2 <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "Nic_nochoice" & all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Solution == "S2"),]
cumulative_analysis_data_S1 <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "Nic_nochoice" & all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Solution == "S1"),]
```


```{r}
final_duration_S2 <- cumulative_analysis_data_S2 %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(final_duration = max(Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee),
                   Solution = "S2",
                   .groups = "drop") #Obtain end durations on sucrose for each bee
final_duration_S1 <- cumulative_analysis_data_S1 %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(final_duration = max(Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee),
                   Solution = "S1",
                   .groups = "drop")
final_duration_S2 <- final_duration_S2 %>% 
  dplyr::filter(bee_ID != "NA_NA")
final_duration_S1 <- final_duration_S1 %>% 
  dplyr::filter(bee_ID != "NA_NA")

final_duration_S2$final_duration <- as.numeric(final_duration_S2$final_duration)
final_duration_S1$final_duration <- as.numeric(final_duration_S1$final_duration)
final_duration_S2$final_duration <- final_duration_S2$final_duration*60
final_duration_S1$final_duration <- final_duration_S1$final_duration*60

#Put these final values back into the original cumulative dataframe so can then identify point at which 50% threshold crossed
cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S2 <- cumulative_analysis_data_S2 %>%
  left_join(final_duration_S2, by = c("bee_ID", "Solution")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent_final = Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec / final_duration)
cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S1 <- cumulative_analysis_data_S1 %>%
  left_join(final_duration_S1, by = c("bee_ID", "Solution")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent_final = Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec / final_duration) #NB: this is a proportion, not a percentage...
```


Find the timestamp of bouts that crossed the relevant threshold
```{r}
t50_times_S2_nicnochoice_duration <- cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S2 %>%
  dplyr::filter(percent_final >= 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  slice_min(Time_min, n = 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    bee_ID, Solution, time_50pct = Time_min,
    Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee, Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee)

t50_times_S2_nicnochoice_duration <- t50_times_S2_nicnochoice_duration %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Solution, .keep_all = TRUE)

t50_times_S1_nicnochoice_duration <- cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S1 %>%
  dplyr::filter(percent_final >= 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  slice_min(Time_min, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    bee_ID, Solution, time_50pct = Time_min,
    Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee, Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee)

all_t50_times_nicnochoice_duration <- rbind(t50_times_S1_nicnochoice_duration, t50_times_S2_nicnochoice_duration)

t50_wide_nicnochoice_duration <- all_t50_times_nicnochoice_duration %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = c(time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee,
                    Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee),
    names_sep = "_")

t50_wide_nicnochoice_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_nicnochoice_duration$Cumulative_attempts_bee_S2)==1),]$Cumulative_attempts_bee_S2 <- 0
t50_wide_nicnochoice_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_nicnochoice_duration$time_50pct_S2)==1),]$time_50pct_S2 <- 0
t50_wide_nicnochoice_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_nicnochoice_duration$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_S2)==1),]$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_S2 <- 0
t50_wide_nicnochoice_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_nicnochoice_duration$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_S2)==1),]$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_S2 <- 0

t50_wide_nicnochoice_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_nicnochoice_duration$Cumulative_attempts_bee_S1)==1),]$Cumulative_attempts_bee_S1 <- 0
t50_wide_nicnochoice_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_nicnochoice_duration$time_50pct_S1)==1),]$time_50pct_S1 <- 0
t50_wide_nicnochoice_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_nicnochoice_duration$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_S1)==1),]$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_S1 <- 0
t50_wide_nicnochoice_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_nicnochoice_duration$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_S1)==1),]$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_S1 <- 0
```

The above produces a wide dataframe with one row per bee, with time to 50% for each solution and cumulative metrics for each solution as different variables

**t50 time**
```{r}
ggplot(all_t50_times_nicnochoice_duration, aes(x = Solution, y = time_50pct)) +
  geom_boxplot() + theme_bw() +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(y = "Time to 50% of final feeding", x = "Solution")

mean(all_t50_times_nicnochoice_duration[which(all_t50_times_nicnochoice_duration$Solution == "S1"),]$time_50pct)
mean(all_t50_times_nicnochoice_duration[which(all_t50_times_nicnochoice_duration$Solution == "S2"),]$time_50pct)
```

Plotting suc choice duration
```{r}
# Extract y-value on nicotine curve at 4.92 hrs
target_time_S1 <- mean(all_t50_times_nicnochoice_duration[which(all_t50_times_nicnochoice_duration$Solution == "S1"),]$time_50pct)/60 #Get the mean observed 50% threshold, in hours rather than mins
target_point_S1 <- Cumulative_data_error_duration %>%
  dplyr::filter(Solution == "S1") %>%
  dplyr::filter(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_S1) == min(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_S1))) %>%
  slice(1)  # In case of ties
target_time_S2 <- mean(all_t50_times_nicnochoice_duration[which(all_t50_times_nicnochoice_duration$Solution == "S2"),]$time_50pct)/60
target_point_S2 <- Cumulative_data_error_duration %>%
  dplyr::filter(Solution == "S2") %>%
  dplyr::filter(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_S2) == min(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_S2))) %>%
  slice(1)  # In case of ties

# Add dotted line to plot
cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_segments_nicnochoice <- cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_nicnochoice +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = target_time_S1, xend = target_time_S1,
        y = 0, yend = target_point_S1$Actual_cumulative),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1
  )  + 
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = target_time_S1,
        y = mean(final_duration_S1$final_duration)/2, yend = mean(final_duration_S1$final_duration)/2),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1
  )  +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = target_time_S2, xend = target_time_S2,
        y = 0, yend = target_point_S2$Actual_cumulative),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1
  ) + geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = target_time_S2,
        y = mean(final_duration_S2$final_duration)/2, yend = mean(final_duration_S2$final_duration)/2),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1)

cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_segments_nicnochoice
```

No choice attempts

```{r}
final_attempts_S2_nicnochoice <- cumulative_analysis_data_S2 %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(final_attempts = max(Cumulative_attempts_bee),
                   Solution = "S2",
                   .groups = "drop")
final_attempts_S1_nicnochoice <- cumulative_analysis_data_S1 %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(final_attempts = max(Cumulative_attempts_bee),
                   Solution = "S1",
                   .groups = "drop")
final_attempts_S2_nicnochoice <- final_attempts_S2_nicnochoice %>% 
  filter(bee_ID != "NA_NA")
final_attempts_S1_nicnochoice <- final_attempts_S1_nicnochoice %>% 
  filter(bee_ID != "NA_NA")

cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S2_nicnochoice_attempts <- cumulative_analysis_data_S2 %>%
  left_join(final_attempts_S2_nicnochoice, by = c("bee_ID", "Solution")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent_final = Cumulative_attempts_bee / final_attempts)
cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S1_nicnochoice_attempts <- cumulative_analysis_data_S1 %>%
  left_join(final_attempts_S1_nicnochoice, by = c("bee_ID", "Solution")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent_final = Cumulative_attempts_bee / final_attempts)
```

Find the timestamp of bouts that crossed the relevant threshold
```{r}
t50_times_S2_nicnochoice_attempts <- cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S2_nicnochoice_attempts %>%
  dplyr::filter(percent_final >= 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  slice_min(Time_min, n = 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    bee_ID, Solution, time_50pct = Time_min,
    Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee, Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee)

t50_times_S2_nicnochoice_attempts <- t50_times_S2_nicnochoice_attempts %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Solution, .keep_all = TRUE)

t50_times_S1_nicnochoice_attempts <- cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S1_nicnochoice_attempts %>%
  dplyr::filter(percent_final >= 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  slice_min(Time_min, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    bee_ID, Solution, time_50pct = Time_min,
    Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee, Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee)

all_t50_times_nicnochoice_attempts <- rbind(t50_times_S2_nicnochoice_attempts, t50_times_S1_nicnochoice_attempts)

t50_wide_nicnochoice_attempts <- all_t50_times_nicnochoice_attempts %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = c(time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee,
                    Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee),
    names_sep = "_")

t50_wide_nicnochoice_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_nicnochoice_attempts$Cumulative_attempts_bee_S2)==1),]$Cumulative_attempts_bee_S2 <- 0
t50_wide_nicnochoice_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_nicnochoice_attempts$time_50pct_S2)==1),]$time_50pct_S2 <- 0
t50_wide_nicnochoice_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_nicnochoice_attempts$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_S2)==1),]$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_S2 <- 0
t50_wide_nicnochoice_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_nicnochoice_attempts$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_S2)==1),]$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_S2 <- 0

t50_wide_nicnochoice_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_nicnochoice_attempts$Cumulative_attempts_bee_S1)==1),]$Cumulative_attempts_bee_S1 <- 0
t50_wide_nicnochoice_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_nicnochoice_attempts$time_50pct_S1)==1),]$time_50pct_S1 <- 0
t50_wide_nicnochoice_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_nicnochoice_attempts$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_S1)==1),]$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_S1 <- 0
t50_wide_nicnochoice_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_nicnochoice_attempts$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_S1)==1),]$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_S1 <- 0
```

**t50 time**
```{r}
ggplot(all_t50_times_nicnochoice_attempts, aes(x = Solution, y = time_50pct)) +
  geom_boxplot() + theme_bw() +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(y = "Time to 50% of final attempts", x = "Solution")

mean(all_t50_times_nicnochoice_attempts[which(all_t50_times_nicnochoice_attempts$Solution == "S1"),]$time_50pct)
mean(all_t50_times_nicnochoice_attempts[which(all_t50_times_nicnochoice_attempts$Solution == "S2"),]$time_50pct)
```


```{r}
# Set seed for reproducibility
set.seed(123)

# Define your cumulative time series data (example)
time_series_S2_attempts <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "S2"),]$av_attempts_change
# Number of bootstrap samples
num_samples <- 1000

# Run the bootstrap function
boot_samples <- bootstrap_time_series(time_series_S2_attempts, num_samples)

# Calculate the mean and 95% confidence intervals for each time point
boot_means <- apply(boot_samples, 2, mean)
boot_se <- apply(boot_samples, 2, sd)  # Standard deviation as SE
boot_ci_lower <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025))
boot_ci_upper <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975))

# Annotate the original data with the error (lower and upper CI)
annotated_data_attempts <- data.frame(
  Time = 1:length(time_series_S2_attempts),
  Cumulative = time_series_S2_attempts,
  Boot_Mean = boot_means,
  SE = boot_se,
  CI_Lower = boot_ci_lower,
  CI_Upper = boot_ci_upper)

annotated_data_attempts$Actual_cumulative <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "S2"),]$av_cumulative_attempts
annotated_data_attempts$Solution <- "S2"


# Define your cumulative time series data (example)
time_series_S1_attempts <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "S1"),]$av_attempts_change
# Run the bootstrap function
boot_samples <- bootstrap_time_series(time_series_S1_attempts, num_samples)
# Calculate the mean and 95% confidence intervals for each time point
boot_means <- apply(boot_samples, 2, mean)
boot_se <- apply(boot_samples, 2, sd)  # Standard deviation as SE
boot_ci_lower <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025))
boot_ci_upper <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975))
# Annotate the original data with the error (lower and upper CI)
annotated_data_attempts2 <- data.frame(
  Time = 1:length(time_series_S1_attempts),
  Cumulative = time_series_S1_attempts,
  Boot_Mean = boot_means,
  SE = boot_se,
  CI_Lower = boot_ci_lower,
  CI_Upper = boot_ci_upper)
annotated_data_attempts2$Actual_cumulative <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "S1"),]$av_cumulative_attempts
annotated_data_attempts2$Solution <- "S1"
```


```{r}
Cumulative_data_error_attempts <- rbind(annotated_data_attempts, annotated_data_attempts2)
Cumulative_data_error_attempts$Time_min <- (Cumulative_data_error_attempts$Time * 60)-60

# Add the new row to the dataframe
Cumulative_data_error_attempts <- rbind(Cumulative_data_error_attempts, S2_origin_row, S1_origin_row)
Cumulative_data_error_attempts$Time_hrs <- Cumulative_data_error_attempts$Time_min/60

cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_nicnochoice <- ggplot(Cumulative_data_error_attempts, aes(x = Time_hrs, y = Actual_cumulative, color = Solution, group = Solution)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) + theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),  # x axis label size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),  # y axis label size
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold",)) + 
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = Actual_cumulative-SE, ymax = Actual_cumulative+SE, fill = Solution), alpha = 0.4, color = NA) +
  labs(y = "Mean cumulative feeds per bee", x = "Time in experiment (hours)") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("S2" = "#5dade2", "S1" = "#5dade2")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("S2" = "#5dade2", "S1" = "#5dade2")) +  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 24, by = 4))
cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_nicnochoice
```

Plotting suc choice attempts with T50s
```{r}
# Extract y-value on nicotine curve at 4.92 hrs
target_time_S1 <- mean(all_t50_times_nicnochoice_attempts[which(all_t50_times_nicnochoice_attempts$Solution == "S1"),]$time_50pct)/60 #Get the mean observed 50% threshold, in hours rather than mins
target_point_S1 <- Cumulative_data_error_attempts %>%
  dplyr::filter(Solution == "S1") %>%
  dplyr::filter(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_S1) == min(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_S1))) %>%
  slice(1)  # In case of ties
target_time_S2 <- mean(all_t50_times_nicnochoice_attempts[which(all_t50_times_nicnochoice_attempts$Solution == "S2"),]$time_50pct)/60
target_point_S2 <- Cumulative_data_error_attempts %>%
  dplyr::filter(Solution == "S2") %>%
  dplyr::filter(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_S2) == min(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_S2))) %>%
  slice(1)  # In case of ties

# Add dotted line to plot
cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_segments_nicnochoice <- cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_nicnochoice +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = target_time_S1, xend = target_time_S1,
        y = 0, yend = target_point_N$Actual_cumulative),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1
  )  +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = target_time_S1,
        y = target_point_S1$Actual_cumulative, yend = target_point_S1$Actual_cumulative),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1
  )  +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = target_time_S2, xend = target_time_S2,
        y = 0, yend = target_point_S2$Actual_cumulative),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = target_time_S2,
        y = target_point_S2$Actual_cumulative, yend = target_point_S2$Actual_cumulative),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1
  ) 

cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_segments_nicnochoice
```

T50 stats

Going to produce 4 lmers, each testing T50 or total; and duration or attempts
To do this, need to produce a dataframe with a row for each bee showing bee ID, solution, T50 attempts, total attempts, T50 duration, total duration

Get rid of unnecessary variables in each dataframe
Then join by bee_ID and solution

```{r}
t50_times_S1_nicnochoice_attempts$Behaviour <- "Attempts"
t50_times_S1_nicnochoice_attempts$Treatment <- "Nic_nochoice"
t50_times_S1_nicnochoice_attempts_ <- t50_times_S1_nicnochoice_attempts %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_attempts_bee)
t50_times_S2_nicnochoice_attempts$Behaviour <- "Attempts"
t50_times_S2_nicnochoice_attempts$Treatment <- "Nic_nochoice"
t50_times_S2_nicnochoice_attempts_ <- t50_times_S2_nicnochoice_attempts %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_attempts_bee)
t50_times_nicnochoice_attempts <- rbind(t50_times_S1_nicnochoice_attempts_, t50_times_S2_nicnochoice_attempts_)

t50_times_S1_nicnochoice_duration$Behaviour <- "Duration"
t50_times_S1_nicnochoice_duration$Treatment <- "Nic_nochoice"
t50_times_S1_nicnochoice_duration_ <- t50_times_S1_nicnochoice_duration %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee)
t50_times_S2_nicnochoice_duration$Behaviour <- "Duration"
t50_times_S2_nicnochoice_duration$Treatment <- "Nic_nochoice"
t50_times_S2_nicnochoice_duration_ <- t50_times_S2_nicnochoice_duration %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee)
t50_times_nicnochoice_duration <- rbind(t50_times_S1_nicnochoice_duration_, t50_times_S2_nicnochoice_duration_)

```

```{r}
t50_times_nicnochoice <- 
  t50_times_nicnochoice_duration %>%
  # Rename variables so they stay distinct after joining
  dplyr::rename(time_50pct_duration = time_50pct) %>%
  left_join(
    t50_times_nicnochoice_attempts %>%
      dplyr::rename(time_50pct_attempts = time_50pct),
    by = c("bee_ID", "Solution", "Treatment"))

all_nochoice_t50_times <- t50_times_nicnochoice
```

Duration total
```{r}
all_nochoice_t50_times$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_sec <- all_nochoice_t50_times$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee*60
all_nochoice_t50_times$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_sec <- as.numeric(all_nochoice_t50_times$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_sec)
all_nochoice_t50_times$Treatment<- as.factor(all_nochoice_t50_times$Treatment)
all_nochoice_t50_times$Solution <- factor(all_nochoice_t50_times$Solution, levels = c("S2", "S1"))

library(lmerTest)
lmm_duration_total_nochoice <- lmer(Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_sec ~ Solution + (1|bee_ID),
                       data = all_nochoice_t50_times)
summary(lmm_duration_total_nochoice)
anova(lmm_duration_total_nochoice)
car::Anova(lmm_duration_total_nochoice)

emm_ctrl_durationtotal <- emmeans(lmm_duration_total_nochoice, ~ Solution)
emm_ctrl_durationtotal_pairs <- pairs(emm_ctrl_durationtotal, adjust = "none", reverse = TRUE)
emm_ctrl_durationtotal_pairs
```
Duration E50
```{r}
lmm_duration_E50_nochoice <- lmer(time_50pct_duration ~ Solution + (1|bee_ID),
                       data = all_nochoice_t50_times)

simres <- simulateResiduals(lmm_duration_E50_nochoice)
plot(simres)
testDispersion(simres)
testZeroInflation(simres) 

summary(lmm_duration_E50_nochoice)
anova(lmm_duration_E50_nochoice)
car::Anova(lmm_duration_E50_nochoice)

emm_nochoice_durationE50 <- emmeans(lmm_duration_E50_nochoice, ~ Solution)
emm_nochoice_durationE50_pairs <- pairs(emm_nochoice_durationE50, adjust = "none", reverse = TRUE)
emm_nochoice_durationE50_pairs
```

Attempts total
```{r}
lmm_attempts_total_nochoice <- lmer(Cumulative_attempts_bee ~ Solution + (1|bee_ID),
                       data = all_nochoice_t50_times)
summary(lmm_attempts_total_nochoice)
anova(lmm_attempts_total_nochoice)
car::Anova(lmm_attempts_total_nochoice)

emm <- emmeans(lmm_attempts_total_nochoice, ~ Solution)
pairs(emm, adjust = "none")
emm
```

Attempts E50
```{r}
lmm_attempts_E50_nochoice <- lmer(time_50pct_attempts ~ Solution + (1|bee_ID),
                       data = all_nochoice_t50_times)

summary(lmm_attempts_E50_nochoice)
anova(lmm_attempts_E50_nochoice)
car::Anova(lmm_attempts_E50_nochoice)

emm <- emmeans(lmm_attempts_E50_nochoice, ~ Solution)
pairs(emm, adjust = "none")
emm
```

P adjustment
```{r}
pvals_nochoice <- c(0.6598, 0.5621, 0.4732, 0.5314)

p.adjust(pvals_nochoice, method = "fdr")
```

**************************************
# 4. Feeding rate analysis
**************************************

We want a dataframe containing bee_ID, treatment, solution, time bin (full), total seconds fed, total feeds
Can then plot mean beh by solution and time
If 0 feeds then put 0 in

```{r}
binned_data_duration_all <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Time_hrs <=24),] %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Time_hrs, Solution, seconds_fed, Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Time_bin = cut_width(Time_hrs, width = 4, boundary = 0)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin, bee_ID, Treatment, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    total_duration = sum(seconds_fed),
    number_feedingattempts = n(),
    .groups = "drop")

# Define allowed solutions for each treatment
solution_map <- tibble(
  Treatment = c("Nic_choice", "Nic_choice",
                "Suc_choice", "Suc_choice",
                "Nic_nochoice", "Nic_nochoice"),
  Solution = c("N", "S",
               "N", "S",
               "S1", "S2"))

# Get all bee/treatment combinations
bees <- binned_data_duration_all %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Treatment) %>%
  drop_na()

# Get all time bins
time_bins <- binned_data_duration_all %>%
  distinct(Time_bin)

# Build full expected structure
full_structure <- bees %>%
  left_join(solution_map, by = "Treatment") %>%
  crossing(time_bins)

# Join original data and fill missing values
binned_data_all_summarised <- full_structure %>%
  left_join(
    binned_data_duration_all,
    by = c("bee_ID", "Treatment", "Solution", "Time_bin")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    total_duration = replace_na(total_duration, 0),
    number_feedingattempts = replace_na(number_feedingattempts, 0)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, Time_bin, Solution)

binned_data_all_summarised <- binned_data_all_summarised %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    lower = as.numeric(str_extract(Time_bin, "\\d+(?=,)")),
    upper = as.numeric(str_extract(Time_bin, "(?<=,)\\d+")),
    midpoint_hrs = (lower + upper) / 2
  ) %>%
  select(-lower, -upper)
```

## No choice

```{r}
# Summarize the mean for each Solution in each time bin, filtering for Nic_choice
mean_data_nic_nochoice_duration <- binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Nic_nochoice"),] %>%
  group_by(Time_bin, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(mean_fed = mean(total_duration, na.rm = TRUE),
                   se = sd(total_duration, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
                   lower = mean_fed - se,
                   upper = mean_fed + se,
                   .groups = "drop")
mean_data_nic_nochoice_feeds <- binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Nic_nochoice"),] %>%
  group_by(Time_bin, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(mean_fed = mean(number_feedingattempts, na.rm = TRUE),
                   se = sd(number_feedingattempts, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
                   lower = mean_fed - se,
                   upper = mean_fed + se,
                   .groups = "drop")

mean_data_nic_nochoice_duration$midpoint_hrs <- c(2, 2, 6, 6, 10, 10, 14, 14, 18, 18, 22, 22)
mean_data_nic_nochoice_feeds$midpoint_hrs <- c(2, 2, 6, 6, 10, 10, 14, 14, 18, 18, 22, 22)
```

### Duration

```{r}
# Create the plot
nic_nochoice_duration_binned_plot <- ggplot(binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Nic_nochoice"),],
                                      aes(x = midpoint_hrs, y = total_duration, color = Solution, shape = Solution)) +
  # Scatter plot with jitter for individual points
  geom_point(aes(color = Solution, shape = Solution), alpha = 0.5,  position = position_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0)) + 
  geom_ribbon(data = mean_data_nic_nochoice_duration, inherit.aes = FALSE,
              aes(x = midpoint_hrs, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = Solution),
              alpha = 0.4) +
  # Line connecting the mean values across time bins
  geom_line(data = mean_data_nic_nochoice_duration, aes(x = midpoint_hrs, y = mean_fed, color = Solution), size = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("S1" = "#5dade2", "S2" = "#5dade2")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("S1" = "#5dade2", "S2" = "#5dade2")) +
  labs(x = "Time segment (h)",
       y = "Total feeding duration (s)",
       title = "") +
  theme_minimal() + scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(2, 6, 10, 14, 18, 22), labels = c("0–4", "4–8", "8–12", "12-16", "16-20", "20-24")) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), legend.position = "none", 
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold",)) + ylim(c(0, 300))

nic_nochoice_duration_binned_plot
```

```{r}
mod_ctrl_duration <- glmmTMB(total_duration~Solution * as.factor(Time_bin) + (1|bee_ID), 
                             family = tweedie(), 
                             data = binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Nic_nochoice"),])

simres <- simulateResiduals(mod_ctrl_duration)
plot(simres)
testDispersion(simres)
testZeroInflation(simres) 
car::Anova(mod_ctrl_duration)

mod_ctrl_duration_red <- glmmTMB(total_duration~Solution + as.factor(Time_bin) + (1|bee_ID), 
                             family = tweedie(), 
                             data = binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Nic_nochoice"),])
car::Anova(mod_ctrl_duration_red)

emmb <- emmeans(mod_ctrl_duration, ~ Solution|Time_bin)
contrast(emmb, method = "pairwise", adjust = "bonferroni")
```

### Feeds

```{r}
# Create the plot
nic_nochoice_feeds_binned_plot <- ggplot(binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Nic_nochoice"),],
                                      aes(x = midpoint_hrs, y = number_feedingattempts, color = Solution, shape = Solution)) +
  # Scatter plot with jitter for individual points
  geom_point(aes(color = Solution, shape = Solution), alpha = 0.5,  position = position_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0)) + 
  geom_ribbon(data = mean_data_nic_nochoice_feeds, inherit.aes = FALSE,
              aes(x = midpoint_hrs, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = Solution),
              alpha = 0.4) +
  # Line connecting the mean values across time bins
  geom_line(data = mean_data_nic_nochoice_feeds, aes(x = midpoint_hrs, y = mean_fed, color = Solution), size = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("S1" = "#5dade2", "S2" = "#5dade2")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("S1" = "#5dade2", "S2" = "#5dade2")) +
  labs(x = "Time segment (h)",
       y = "Total feeding duration (s)",
       title = "") +
  theme_minimal() + scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(2, 6, 10, 14, 18, 22), labels = c("0–4", "4–8", "8–12", "12-16", "16-20", "20-24")) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), legend.position = "none", 
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold",)) + ylim(c(0, 75))

nic_nochoice_feeds_binned_plot
```

```{r}
mod_ctrl_feeds <- glmmTMB(number_feedingattempts~Solution * as.factor(Time_bin) + (1|bee_ID), 
                             family = tweedie(), 
                             data = binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Nic_nochoice"),])

simres <- simulateResiduals(mod_ctrl_feeds)
plot(simres)
testDispersion(simres)
testZeroInflation(simres) 
car::Anova(mod_ctrl_feeds)

mod_ctrl_feeds_red <- glmmTMB(number_feedingattempts~Solution + as.factor(Time_bin) + (1|bee_ID), 
                             family = tweedie(), 
                             data = binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Nic_nochoice"),])
car::Anova(mod_ctrl_feeds_red)

emmb <- emmeans(mod_ctrl_feeds, ~ Solution|Time_bin)
contrast(emmb, method = "pairwise", adjust = "bonferroni")
```

## Nic choice

```{r}
# Summarize the mean for each Solution in each time bin, filtering for Nic_choice
mean_data_nic_choice_duration <- binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Nic_choice"),] %>%
  group_by(Time_bin, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(mean_fed = mean(total_duration, na.rm = TRUE),
                   se = sd(total_duration, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
                   lower = mean_fed - se,
                   upper = mean_fed + se,
                   .groups = "drop")
mean_data_nic_choice_feeds <- binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Nic_choice"),] %>%
  group_by(Time_bin, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(mean_fed = mean(number_feedingattempts, na.rm = TRUE),
                   se = sd(number_feedingattempts, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
                   lower = mean_fed - se,
                   upper = mean_fed + se,
                   .groups = "drop")

mean_data_nic_choice_duration$midpoint_hrs <- c(2, 2, 6, 6, 10, 10, 14, 14, 18, 18, 22, 22)
mean_data_nic_choice_feeds$midpoint_hrs <- c(2, 2, 6, 6, 10, 10, 14, 14, 18, 18, 22, 22)
```

### Duration

```{r}
# Create the plot
nic_choice_duration_binned_plot <- ggplot(binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Nic_choice"),],
                                      aes(x = midpoint_hrs, y = total_duration, color = Solution, shape = Solution)) +
  # Scatter plot with jitter for individual points
  geom_point(aes(color = Solution, shape = Solution), alpha = 0.5,  position = position_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0)) + 
  geom_ribbon(data = mean_data_nic_choice_duration, inherit.aes = FALSE,
              aes(x = midpoint_hrs, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = Solution),
              alpha = 0.4) +
  # Line connecting the mean values across time bins
  geom_line(data = mean_data_nic_choice_duration, aes(x = midpoint_hrs, y = mean_fed, color = Solution), size = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("N" = "#f28c28", "S" = "#5dade2")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("N" = "#f28c28", "S" = "#5dade2")) +
  labs(x = "Time segment (h)",
       y = "Total feeding duration (s)",
       title = "") +
  theme_minimal() + scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(2, 6, 10, 14, 18, 22), labels = c("0–4", "4–8", "8–12", "12-16", "16-20", "20-24")) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), legend.position = "none", 
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold",)) + ylim(c(0, 300))

nic_choice_duration_binned_plot
```

```{r}
mod_ctrl_duration_nicchoice <- glmmTMB(total_duration~Solution * as.factor(Time_bin) + (1|bee_ID), 
                             family = tweedie(), 
                             data = binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Nic_choice"),])

simres <- simulateResiduals(mod_ctrl_duration_nicchoice)
plot(simres)
testDispersion(simres)
testZeroInflation(simres) 
car::Anova(mod_ctrl_duration_nicchoice)

mod_ctrl_duration_red <- glmmTMB(total_duration~Solution + as.factor(Time_bin) + (1|bee_ID), 
                             family = tweedie(), 
                             data = binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Nic_choice"),])
car::Anova(mod_ctrl_duration_red)

emmb <- emmeans(mod_ctrl_duration_nicchoice, ~ Solution|Time_bin)
contrast(emmb, method = "pairwise", adjust = "bonferroni")
```

### Feeds

```{r}
# Create the plot
nic_choice_feeds_binned_plot <- ggplot(binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Nic_choice"),],
                                      aes(x = midpoint_hrs, y = number_feedingattempts, color = Solution, shape = Solution)) +
  # Scatter plot with jitter for individual points
  geom_point(aes(color = Solution, shape = Solution), alpha = 0.5,  position = position_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0)) + 
  geom_ribbon(data = mean_data_nic_choice_feeds, inherit.aes = FALSE,
              aes(x = midpoint_hrs, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = Solution),
              alpha = 0.4) +
  # Line connecting the mean values across time bins
  geom_line(data = mean_data_nic_choice_feeds, aes(x = midpoint_hrs, y = mean_fed, color = Solution), size = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("N" = "#f28c28", "S" = "#5dade2")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("N" = "#f28c28", "S" = "#5dade2")) +
  labs(x = "Time segment (h)",
       y = "Total feeding duration (s)",
       title = "") +
  theme_minimal() + scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(2, 6, 10, 14, 18, 22), labels = c("0–4", "4–8", "8–12", "12-16", "16-20", "20-24")) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), legend.position = "none", 
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold",))

nic_choice_feeds_binned_plot
```

```{r}
mod_nicchoice_feeds <- glmmTMB(number_feedingattempts~Solution * as.factor(Time_bin) + (1|bee_ID), 
                             family = tweedie(), 
                             data = binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Nic_choice"),])

simres <- simulateResiduals(mod_nicchoice_feeds)
plot(simres)
testDispersion(simres)
testZeroInflation(simres) 
car::Anova(mod_nicchoice_feeds)

mod_nicchoice_feeds_red <- glmmTMB(number_feedingattempts~Solution + as.factor(Time_bin) + (1|bee_ID), 
                             family = tweedie(), 
                             data = binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Nic_choice"),])
car::Anova(mod_nicchoice_feeds_red)

emmb <- emmeans(mod_nicchoice_feeds, ~ Solution|Time_bin)
contrast(emmb, method = "pairwise", adjust = "bonferroni")
```

## Suc choice

```{r}
# Summarize the mean for each Solution in each time bin, filtering for Nic_choice
mean_data_suc_choice_duration <- binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Suc_choice"),] %>%
  group_by(Time_bin, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(mean_fed = mean(total_duration, na.rm = TRUE),
                   se = sd(total_duration, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
                   lower = mean_fed - se,
                   upper = mean_fed + se,
                   .groups = "drop")
mean_data_suc_choice_feeds <- binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Suc_choice"),] %>%
  group_by(Time_bin, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(mean_fed = mean(number_feedingattempts, na.rm = TRUE),
                   se = sd(number_feedingattempts, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
                   lower = mean_fed - se,
                   upper = mean_fed + se,
                   .groups = "drop")

mean_data_suc_choice_duration$midpoint_hrs <- c(2, 2, 6, 6, 10, 10, 14, 14, 18, 18, 22, 22)
mean_data_suc_choice_feeds$midpoint_hrs <- c(2, 2, 6, 6, 10, 10, 14, 14, 18, 18, 22, 22)
```

### Duration

```{r}
# Create the plot
suc_choice_duration_binned_plot <- ggplot(binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Suc_choice"),],
                                      aes(x = midpoint_hrs, y = total_duration, color = Solution, shape = Solution)) +
  # Scatter plot with jitter for individual points
  geom_point(aes(color = Solution, shape = Solution), alpha = 0.5,  position = position_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0)) + 
  geom_ribbon(data = mean_data_suc_choice_duration, inherit.aes = FALSE,
              aes(x = midpoint_hrs, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = Solution),
              alpha = 0.4) +
  # Line connecting the mean values across time bins
  geom_line(data = mean_data_suc_choice_duration, aes(x = midpoint_hrs, y = mean_fed, color = Solution), size = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("N" = "#f28c28", "S" = "#5dade2")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("N" = "#f28c28", "S" = "#5dade2")) +
  labs(x = "Time segment (h)",
       y = "Total feeding duration (s)",
       title = "") +
  theme_minimal() + scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(2, 6, 10, 14, 18, 22), labels = c("0–4", "4–8", "8–12", "12-16", "16-20", "20-24")) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), legend.position = "none", 
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold",)) + ylim(c(0, 300))

suc_choice_duration_binned_plot
```

```{r}
mod_ctrl_duration_succhoice <- glmmTMB(total_duration~Solution * as.factor(Time_bin) + (1|bee_ID), 
                             family = tweedie(), 
                             data = binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Suc_choice"),])

simres <- simulateResiduals(mod_ctrl_duration_succhoice)
plot(simres)
testDispersion(simres)
testZeroInflation(simres) 
car::Anova(mod_ctrl_duration_succhoice)

mod_ctrl_duration_succhoice_red <- glmmTMB(total_duration~Solution + as.factor(Time_bin) + (1|bee_ID), 
                             family = tweedie(), 
                             data = binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Suc_choice"),])
car::Anova(mod_ctrl_duration_succhoice_red)

emmb <- emmeans(mod_ctrl_duration_succhoice, ~ Solution|Time_bin)
contrast(emmb, method = "pairwise", adjust = "bonferroni")
```

### Feeds

```{r}
# Create the plot
suc_choice_feeds_binned_plot <- ggplot(binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Suc_choice"),],
                                      aes(x = midpoint_hrs, y = number_feedingattempts, color = Solution, shape = Solution)) +
  # Scatter plot with jitter for individual points
  geom_point(aes(color = Solution, shape = Solution), alpha = 0.5,  position = position_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0)) + 
  geom_ribbon(data = mean_data_suc_choice_feeds, inherit.aes = FALSE,
              aes(x = midpoint_hrs, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = Solution),
              alpha = 0.4) +
  # Line connecting the mean values across time bins
  geom_line(data = mean_data_suc_choice_feeds, aes(x = midpoint_hrs, y = mean_fed, color = Solution), size = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("N" = "#f28c28", "S" = "#5dade2")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("N" = "#f28c28", "S" = "#5dade2")) +
  labs(x = "Time segment (h)",
       y = "Total feeds",
       title = "") +
  theme_minimal() + scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(2, 6, 10, 14, 18, 22), labels = c("0–4", "4–8", "8–12", "12-16", "16-20", "20-24")) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), legend.position = "none", 
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold",)) + ylim(c(0, 75))

suc_choice_feeds_binned_plot
```

```{r}
mod_succhoice_feeds <- glmmTMB(number_feedingattempts~Solution * as.factor(Time_bin) + (1|bee_ID), 
                             family = tweedie(), 
                             data = binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Suc_choice"),])

simres <- simulateResiduals(mod_succhoice_feeds)
plot(simres)
testDispersion(simres)
testZeroInflation(simres) 
car::Anova(mod_succhoice_feeds)

mod_succhoice_feeds_red <- glmmTMB(number_feedingattempts~Solution + as.factor(Time_bin) + (1|bee_ID), 
                             family = tweedie(), 
                             data = binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "Suc_choice"),])
car::Anova(mod_succhoice_feeds_red)

emmb <- emmeans(mod_succhoice_feeds, ~ Solution|Time_bin)
contrast(emmb, method = "pairwise", adjust = "bonferroni")
```

**************************************
# 4. FBD analysis
**************************************

# First bout duration analysis

```{r}
filtered_drinking_data <- filtered_drinking_data %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Round, RPi) %>%              # Group by Round and RPi
  dplyr::mutate(bee_ID = paste(Round, RPi, sep = "_")) %>%    # Assign a unique ID for each (Round, RPi) combination
  ungroup()

filtered_drinking_data <- filtered_drinking_data %>%
    dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>% # Group by Round and RPi
    dplyr::arrange(Time_min) %>% #Order by time
    dplyr::mutate(bout_no_perbee = row_number()) %>% # Create an incremental bout number per bee
    ungroup()

first_bouts <- filtered_drinking_data %>%
    dplyr::filter(bout_no_perbee == 1)

first_feeding_timestamps <- first_bouts$Time_min

first_bouts$Solution <- factor(first_bouts$Solution, levels = c("S", "N", "S1", "S2"))
```


Vs initiation of feeding on second tube

```{r}
# Get the first feeding time for each bee (first feed)
first_feeding_time <- filtered_drinking_data %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, Time_min) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(start_time = min(Time_min), tube = first(Tube))
```

```{r}
# Find the first switch to the opposite tube for each bee
opposite_feeding_time <- filtered_drinking_data %>%
  dplyr::left_join(first_feeding_time, by = "bee_ID") %>%  # Join to get start_tube for each bee
  dplyr::filter(Time_min > start_time & Tube != tube) %>%  # Filter for opposite tube after first feed
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    switch_time = min(Time_min),   # Time of the first switch to the opposite tube
    switch_tube = first(Tube))     # The tube fed on after switching

# Combine the results (start time + switch time)
feeding_summary <- first_feeding_time %>%
  dplyr::left_join(opposite_feeding_time, by = "bee_ID")

switch_timestamps <- feeding_summary$switch_time
```

First bouts per bee from both tubes:
```{r}
first_opposite_feeding_bout <- filtered_drinking_data %>%
  dplyr::left_join(first_feeding_time, by = "bee_ID") %>%  # Join to get start_tube for each bee
  dplyr::filter(Time_min > start_time & Tube != tube) %>%  # Filter for opposite tube after first feed
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Time_min == min(Time_min)) %>%  # Keep only the row with the lowest Time_min per bee_ID
  dplyr::ungroup()  # Ungroup to avoid unintended grouped behavior later

all_first_bouts <- bind_rows(
  first_opposite_feeding_bout %>% select(-bee_ID, -start_time, -tube),  # Remove the three columns
  first_bouts)

all_first_bouts$Solution <- factor(all_first_bouts$Solution, levels = c("S", "N", "S1", "S2"))
```

**3a. Duration of first bout**
```{r}
first_bout_duration_analysis <- all_first_bouts %>%
  dplyr::mutate(bee_ID2 = paste(Round, RPi, sep = "_")) %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID2, Treatment, Solution, duration) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = duration,
    names_prefix = "firstbout_"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    diff_firstbout = case_when(
      Treatment %in% c("Nic_choice", "Suc_choice") ~ firstbout_N - firstbout_S,
      Treatment == "Nic_nochoice" ~ firstbout_S1 - firstbout_S2,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_))

first_bout_duration_analysis$diff_firstbout_s <- first_bout_duration_analysis$diff_firstbout*60
```

```{r}
# Summarize means and SE per treatment
summary_stats <- first_bout_duration_analysis %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Treatment) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = sum(!is.na(diff_firstbout_s)),
    mean_diff = mean(diff_firstbout_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_diff = sd(diff_firstbout_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_diff = sd_diff / sqrt(n))
```


```{r}
# Define custom order
treatment_order <- c("Suc_choice", "Nic_choice", "Nic_nochoice")
# Apply order to both datasets
summary_stats$Treatment <- factor(summary_stats$Treatment, levels = treatment_order)

fbd_dif_plot <- ggplot() +
  # Bar for group mean
  geom_col(data = summary_stats,
           aes(x = Treatment, y = mean_diff, fill = Treatment),
           width = 0.6, alpha = 0.8) +
  # Error bars (SE)
  geom_errorbar(data = summary_stats,
                aes(x = Treatment, ymin = mean_diff - se_diff, ymax = mean_diff + se_diff),
                width = 0.2, color = "black") +
  # Horizontal reference line at 0
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey30") +
  # Flip axes to get horizontal bars
  coord_flip() + 
  # Custom fill colors
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    Suc_choice = "#5dade2",    # orange
    Nic_choice = "#F28C28",    # blue
    Nic_nochoice = "grey90")) +  # green
  # Labels and theme
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +  theme(legend.position = "none", panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank()) +
  labs(
    y = "Mean difference in first bout duration (s)",
    x = NULL,
    fill = NULL  # remove redundant legend title
  ) + ylim(c(-60, 60)) + 
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(succhoice = "Naive", nicchoice = "Pre-exposed", nicnochoice = "No-choice"))

fbd_dif_plot
```

Stats
```{r}
first_bout_duration_analysis$Treatment <- factor(first_bout_duration_analysis$Treatment, levels = c("Nic_nochoice", "Nic_choice", "Suc_choice"))

fbd_mod <- lm(diff_firstbout_s ~ Treatment, data = first_bout_duration_analysis)

summary(fbd_mod)
anova(fbd_mod)

emm <- emmeans(fbd_mod, ~ Treatment)
emm
test(emm, null = 0)
```

**************************************
# 5. Preference analysis
**************************************

*Continuous*

```{r}
# Create a numeric bee ID variable
all_drinking_data_cumulative_nicchoice <- all_drinking_data_cumulative[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative$Treatment == "Nic_choice"),] %>%
  dplyr::mutate(bee_ID_numeric = as.integer(factor(paste(RPi, Round, sep = "_"))))
```

```{r}
# Calculate preference index for each bee
preference_trajectories_nicchoice <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_nicchoice %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Time_min) %>%  # Ensure data is ordered by time
  dplyr::mutate(
    cumulative_N = cumsum(ifelse(Solution == "N", duration, 0)),  # Cumulative duration for N
    cumulative_S = cumsum(ifelse(Solution == "S", duration, 0)),  # Cumulative duration for S
    preference_index = (cumulative_N - cumulative_S) / (cumulative_N + cumulative_S))

preference_trajectories_nicchoice[which(is.na(preference_trajectories_nicchoice$preference_index)),]$preference_index <- 0
```

Plot duration-based PI
```{r}
preference_plot_nicchoice_duration <- ggplot(
  preference_trajectories_nicchoice[which(preference_trajectories_nicchoice$Time_min <= 1440 & preference_trajectories_nicchoice$Time_min!=0),],
  aes(x = Time_hrs, y = preference_index, color = preference_index)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 0.1, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey", size = 0.8) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-1, 1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 24, by = 4)) +
  scale_color_gradient2(
    low = "#5dade2",      # red for -1
    mid = "grey90",        # neutral at 0
    high = "#f28c28",     # green for +1
    midpoint = 0,
    limits = c(-1, 1)) +
  labs(
    x = "Time in experiment (hours)",
    y = "Cumulative preference index") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"))

preference_plot_nicchoice_duration
```

## Naive

```{r}
# Create a numeric bee ID variable
all_drinking_data_cumulative_succhoice <- all_drinking_data_cumulative[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative$Treatment == "Suc_choice"),] %>%
  dplyr::mutate(bee_ID_numeric = as.integer(factor(paste(RPi, Round, sep = "_"))))
```

```{r}
# Calculate preference index for each bee
preference_trajectories_succhoice <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_succhoice %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Time_min) %>%  # Ensure data is ordered by time
  dplyr::mutate(
    cumulative_N = cumsum(ifelse(Solution == "N", duration, 0)),  # Cumulative duration for N
    cumulative_S = cumsum(ifelse(Solution == "S", duration, 0)),  # Cumulative duration for S
    preference_index = (cumulative_N - cumulative_S) / (cumulative_N + cumulative_S))

preference_trajectories_succhoice[which(is.na(preference_trajectories_succhoice$preference_index)),]$preference_index <- 0
```

Plot duration-based PI
```{r}
preference_plot_succhoice_duration <- ggplot(
  preference_trajectories_succhoice[which(preference_trajectories_succhoice$Time_min <= 1440 & preference_trajectories_succhoice$Time_min!=0),],
  aes(x = Time_hrs, y = preference_index, color = preference_index)
) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 0.1, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey", size = 0.8) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-1, 1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 24, by = 4)) +
  scale_color_gradient2(
    low = "#5dade2",      # red for -1
    mid = "grey90",        # neutral at 0
    high = "#f28c28",     # green for +1
    midpoint = 0,
    limits = c(-1, 1)) +
  labs(
    x = "Time in experiment (hours)",
    y = "Cumulative preference index") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"))

preference_plot_succhoice_duration
```

## No choice


```{r}
# Create a numeric bee ID variable
all_drinking_data_cumulative_nicnochoice <- all_drinking_data_cumulative[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative$Treatment == "Nic_nochoice"),] %>%
  dplyr::mutate(bee_ID_numeric = as.integer(factor(paste(RPi, Round, sep = "_"))))
```

```{r}
# Calculate preference index for each bee
preference_trajectories_nicnochoice <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_nicnochoice %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Time_min) %>%  # Ensure data is ordered by time
  dplyr::mutate(
    cumulative_S1 = cumsum(ifelse(Solution == "S1", duration, 0)),  # Cumulative duration for N
    cumulative_S2 = cumsum(ifelse(Solution == "S2", duration, 0)),  # Cumulative duration for S
    preference_index = (cumulative_S1 - cumulative_S2) / (cumulative_S1 + cumulative_S2))

preference_trajectories_nicnochoice[which(is.na(preference_trajectories_nicnochoice$preference_index)),]$preference_index <- 0
```

Plot duration-based PI
```{r}
preference_plot_nicnochoice_duration <- ggplot(
  preference_trajectories_nicnochoice[which(preference_trajectories_nicnochoice$Time_min <= 1440 & preference_trajectories_nicnochoice$Time_min!=0),],
  aes(x = Time_hrs, y = preference_index, color = preference_index)
) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 0.1, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey", size = 0.8) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-1, 1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 24, by = 4)) +
  scale_color_gradient2(
    low = "#5dade2",      # red for -1
    mid = "grey90",        # neutral at 0
    high = "#5dade2",     # green for +1
    midpoint = 0,
    limits = c(-1, 1)) +
  labs(
    x = "Time in experiment (hours)",
    y = "Cumulative preference index") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"))

preference_plot_nicnochoice_duration
```

PREFERENCE BOXPLOTS

*Duration-based PI*

```{r}
end_cumulative_data <- filled_data[which(filled_data$Time_bin == "(23,24]"),]
end_cumulative_data$Solution <- as.factor(end_cumulative_data$Solution)

end_pref_df_duration_nicnochoice <- end_cumulative_data %>%
  dplyr::filter(Time_bin == "(23,24]") %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Solution, max_total_duration) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = max_total_duration,
    names_prefix = "duration_") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    quinine_PI_duration = (duration_S1 - duration_S2) / (duration_S1 + duration_S2)) %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, quinine_PI_duration)

end_pref_sips_nicchoice <- end_cumulative_data %>%
  dplyr::filter(Time_bin == "(23,24]") %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Solution, max_sips) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = max_sips,
    names_prefix = "sips_") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    quinine_PI_sips = (sips_S1 - sips_S2) / (sips_S1 + sips_S2)) %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, quinine_PI_sips)

#Merge by bee_ID
all_end_pref_nicnochoice <- end_pref_df_duration_nicnochoice

all_end_pref_nicnochoice <- all_end_pref_nicnochoice %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Q1_duration = quantile(quinine_PI_duration, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3_duration = quantile(quinine_PI_duration, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_duration = Q3_duration - Q1_duration,
    is_outlier_duration = quinine_PI_duration < (Q1_duration - 1.5 * IQR_duration) | quinine_PI_duration > (Q3_duration + 1.5 * IQR_duration))
```

```{r}
nicnochoice_PI_duration_bp <- ggplot(all_end_pref_nicnochoice, aes(x = "", y = quinine_PI_duration)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0, width = 1) +  # Transparent boxplot
  geom_jitter(
    data = filter(all_end_pref_nicnochoice, !is_outlier_duration),
    aes(color = quinine_PI_duration),
    width = 0.2, size = 1, alpha = 1) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 21, size = 3, fill = "black") +  # Mean as black dot
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey", size = 0.8) +  # Baseline at y = 0
  ylim(c(-1, 1)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Conventional 24h volume-based PI",
    x = "",
    y = "Preference index") +
  scale_color_gradient2(
    low = "#5dade2",   # Blue
    mid = "snow2",     # Neutral
    high = "#5dade2",  # Orange
    midpoint = 0,
    limits = c(-1, 1),
    name = "PI") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 0),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold"))
nicnochoice_PI_duration_bp
```

# Nic choice

```{r}
binned_data_duration <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "Nic_choice" & all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Time_hrs <=24),] %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Time_hrs, Solution, seconds_fed, sip_frequency, mean_inter_sip_interval, Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Time_bin = cut_width(Time_hrs, width = 1, boundary = 0)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin, bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    max_total_duration = max(Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_sips = max(Cumulative_sips_overall_bee),
    av_sipfreq = mean(sip_frequency, na.rm = TRUE),
    number_feedingattempts = n(),
    av_inter_sip_interval = mean(mean_inter_sip_interval, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")
```

Fill in missing cumulative entries (if no bouts occurred for a given bee in a given time bin, add a row to the dataframe with 0s for the behaviours)
```{r}
# Create a reference grid of all combinations
bee_time_solution_grid <- binned_data_duration %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Time_bin, Solution)

# Expand to all combinations of bee_ID x Time_bin x Solution
full_data <- binned_data_duration %>%
  distinct(bee_ID) %>%
  crossing(
    Time_bin = unique(binned_data_duration$Time_bin),
    Solution = unique(binned_data_duration$Solution))

# Join original data into full grid
filled_data <- full_data %>%
  left_join(binned_data_duration, by = c("bee_ID", "Time_bin", "Solution")) %>%
  # Order for fill to work properly
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, Solution, Time_bin) %>%
  # Fill missing cumulative durations forward within each bee + solution
  group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_total_duration, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_sips, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(number_feedingattempts, .direction = "down") %>%
  # If it starts with missing (i.e., first bin), set to 0
  dplyr::mutate(max_total_duration = replace_na(max_total_duration, 0),
         max_sips = replace_na(max_sips, 0),
         number_feedingattempts = replace_na(number_feedingattempts, 0)) %>%
   # Step 1: lag previous total duration
  dplyr::mutate(prev_duration = lag(max_total_duration, default = 0),
                # Step 2: check if it increased
                new_attempt = if_else(max_total_duration > prev_duration, 1, 0),
                # Step 3: cumulative count only when duration increases
                cumulative_feedingattempts = cumsum(if_else(new_attempt == 1, number_feedingattempts, 0))) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(bee_ID) & bee_ID != "NA_NA") %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
end_cumulative_data <- filled_data[which(filled_data$Time_bin == "(23,24]"),]
end_cumulative_data$Solution <- as.factor(end_cumulative_data$Solution)

end_pref_df_duration_nicchoice <- end_cumulative_data %>%
  dplyr::filter(Time_bin == "(23,24]") %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Solution, max_total_duration) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = max_total_duration,
    names_prefix = "duration_") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    quinine_PI_duration = (duration_N - duration_S) / (duration_N + duration_S)) %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, quinine_PI_duration)

end_pref_sips_nicchoice <- end_cumulative_data %>%
  dplyr::filter(Time_bin == "(23,24]") %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Solution, max_sips) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = max_sips,
    names_prefix = "sips_") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    quinine_PI_sips = (sips_N - sips_S) / (sips_N + sips_S)) %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, quinine_PI_sips)

all_end_pref_nicchoice <- end_pref_df_duration_nicchoice

all_end_pref_nicchoice <- all_end_pref_nicchoice %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Q1_duration = quantile(quinine_PI_duration, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3_duration = quantile(quinine_PI_duration, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_duration = Q3_duration - Q1_duration,
    is_outlier_duration = quinine_PI_duration < (Q1_duration - 1.5 * IQR_duration) | quinine_PI_duration > (Q3_duration + 1.5 * IQR_duration))
```

```{r}
nicchoice_PI_duration_bp <- ggplot(all_end_pref_nicchoice, aes(x = "", y = quinine_PI_duration)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0, width = 1) +  # Transparent boxplot
  geom_jitter(
    data = filter(all_end_pref_nicchoice, !is_outlier_duration),
    aes(color = quinine_PI_duration),
    width = 0.2, size = 1, alpha = 1) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 21, size = 3, fill = "black") +  # Mean as black dot
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey", size = 0.8) +  # Baseline at y = 0
  ylim(c(-1, 1)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Conventional 24h volume-based PI",
    x = "",
    y = "Preference index") +
  scale_color_gradient2(
    low = "#5dade2",   # Blue
    mid = "snow2",     # Neutral
    high = "#f28c28",  # Orange
    midpoint = 0,
    limits = c(-1, 1),
    name = "PI") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 0),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold"))
nicchoice_PI_duration_bp
```

# Suc choice

```{r}
binned_data_duration <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "Suc_choice" & all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Time_hrs <=24),] %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Time_hrs, Solution, seconds_fed, sip_frequency, mean_inter_sip_interval, Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Time_bin = cut_width(Time_hrs, width = 1, boundary = 0)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin, bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    max_total_duration = max(Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_sips = max(Cumulative_sips_overall_bee),
    av_sipfreq = mean(sip_frequency, na.rm = TRUE),
    number_feedingattempts = n(),
    av_inter_sip_interval = mean(mean_inter_sip_interval, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")
```

Fill in missing cumulative entries (if no bouts occurred for a given bee in a given time bin, add a row to the dataframe with 0s for the behaviours)
```{r}
# Create a reference grid of all combinations
bee_time_solution_grid <- binned_data_duration %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Time_bin, Solution)

# Expand to all combinations of bee_ID x Time_bin x Solution
full_data <- binned_data_duration %>%
  distinct(bee_ID) %>%
  crossing(
    Time_bin = unique(binned_data_duration$Time_bin),
    Solution = unique(binned_data_duration$Solution))

# Join original data into full grid
filled_data <- full_data %>%
  left_join(binned_data_duration, by = c("bee_ID", "Time_bin", "Solution")) %>%
  # Order for fill to work properly
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, Solution, Time_bin) %>%
  # Fill missing cumulative durations forward within each bee + solution
  group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_total_duration, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_sips, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(number_feedingattempts, .direction = "down") %>%
  # If it starts with missing (i.e., first bin), set to 0
  dplyr::mutate(max_total_duration = replace_na(max_total_duration, 0),
         max_sips = replace_na(max_sips, 0),
         number_feedingattempts = replace_na(number_feedingattempts, 0)) %>%
```
