```{r}
   # Step 1: lag previous total duration
  dplyr::mutate(prev_duration = lag(max_total_duration, default = 0),
                # Step 2: check if it increased
                new_attempt = if_else(max_total_duration > prev_duration, 1, 0),
                # Step 3: cumulative count only when duration increases
                cumulative_feedingattempts = cumsum(if_else(new_attempt == 1, number_feedingattempts, 0))) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(bee_ID) & bee_ID != "NA_NA") %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
end_cumulative_data <- filled_data[which(filled_data$Time_bin == "(23,24]"),]
end_cumulative_data$Solution <- as.factor(end_cumulative_data$Solution)

end_pref_df_duration_succhoice <- end_cumulative_data %>%
  dplyr::filter(Time_bin == "(23,24]") %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Solution, max_total_duration) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = max_total_duration,
    names_prefix = "duration_") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    quinine_PI_duration = (duration_N - duration_S) / (duration_N + duration_S)) %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, quinine_PI_duration)

all_end_pref_succhoice <- end_pref_df_duration_succhoice

all_end_pref_succhoice <- all_end_pref_succhoice %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Q1_duration = quantile(quinine_PI_duration, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3_duration = quantile(quinine_PI_duration, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_duration = Q3_duration - Q1_duration,
    is_outlier_duration = quinine_PI_duration < (Q1_duration - 1.5 * IQR_duration) | quinine_PI_duration > (Q3_duration + 1.5 * IQR_duration))
```

```{r}
succhoice_PI_duration_bp <- ggplot(all_end_pref_succhoice, aes(x = "", y = quinine_PI_duration)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0, width = 1) +  # Transparent boxplot
  geom_jitter(
    data = filter(all_end_pref_succhoice, !is_outlier_duration),
    aes(color = quinine_PI_duration),
    width = 0.2, size = 1, alpha = 1) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 21, size = 3, fill = "black") +  # Mean as black dot
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey", size = 0.8) +  # Baseline at y = 0
  ylim(c(-1, 1)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Conventional 24h volume-based PI",
    x = "",
    y = "Preference index") +
  scale_color_gradient2(
    low = "#5dade2",   # Blue
    mid = "snow2",     # Neutral
    high = "#f28c28",  # Orange
    midpoint = 0,
    limits = c(-1, 1),
    name = "PI") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 0),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold"))
succhoice_PI_duration_bp
```

## Mass consumed

```{r}
blinds_ID <- blinds %>%
  dplyr::mutate(bee_ID_numeric = paste(RPi, Round, sep = "_"))

blinds_ID$Change <- as.numeric(blinds_ID$Change)

blinds_ID$Change_net <- blinds_ID$Change - 0.09
blinds_ID$Change_net <- ifelse(blinds_ID$Change_net < 0, 0, blinds_ID$Change_net)

# Create a new dataframe with one row per bee and compute the preference index
bee_preference_data_nicchoice <- blinds_ID[which(blinds_ID$Treatment == "Nic_choice" & blinds_ID$Notes == "Alive"),] %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID_numeric) %>%  # Group by bee ID and Treatment
  dplyr::summarize(
    total_Q = sum(Change_net[Solution == "N"], na.rm = TRUE),
    total_S = sum(Change_net[Solution == "S"], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    # Calculate preference index based on the treatment
    preference_index = (total_Q - total_S) / (total_Q + total_S))

bee_preference_data_nicchoice <- bee_preference_data_nicchoice %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Q1 = quantile(preference_index, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3 = quantile(preference_index, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = Q3 - Q1,
    is_outlier = preference_index < (Q1 - 1.5 * IQR) | preference_index > (Q3 + 1.5 * IQR))
```

Plot mass-based PI

```{r}
nicchoice_mass_PI_bp <- ggplot(bee_preference_data_nicchoice, aes(x = "", y = preference_index, fill = "")) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0, width = 1) +  # Make boxplots transparent
  geom_jitter(data = filter(bee_preference_data_nicchoice, !is_outlier), aes(color = preference_index), width = 0.2, size = 1, alpha = 1) +  # Add jittered points
  theme_minimal() + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey", size = 0.8) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 21, size = 3, color = "black") +  # Mean as a black dot
  labs(
    title = "Conventional 24h volume-based PI",
    x = "",
    y = "Preference index") +
  scale_color_gradient2(
    low = "#5dade2",   # Blue
    mid = "snow2",     # Neutral
    high = "#F28C28",  # Orange
    midpoint = 0,
    limits = c(-1, 1),
    name = "PI") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = "black") +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 0),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 0),  # Align y-axis titles by removing x-axis title
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),  # y axis label size
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold")) + ylim(c(-1,1))  # Baseline at y=0

nicchoice_mass_PI_bp
```

Mass consumed of each solution
```{r}
bee_preference_data_nicchoice2 <- bee_preference_data_nicchoice %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Q1 = quantile(preference_index, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3 = quantile(preference_index, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = Q3 - Q1,
    is_outlier = preference_index < (Q1 - 1.5 * IQR) | preference_index > (Q3 + 1.5 * IQR))

long_bee_preference_data_nicchoice2 <- bee_preference_data_nicchoice2 %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(total_Q, total_S),
    names_to = "Solution",
    names_prefix = "total_",
    values_to = "total")
long_bee_preference_data_nicchoice2$Solution <- as.factor(long_bee_preference_data_nicchoice2$Solution)

long_bee_preference_data_nicchoice2 <- long_bee_preference_data_nicchoice2 %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Solution) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Q1 = quantile(total, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3 = quantile(total, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = Q3 - Q1,
    is_outlier = total < (Q1 - 1.5 * IQR) | total > (Q3 + 1.5 * IQR))

long_bee_preference_data_nicchoice2$ul <- (long_bee_preference_data_nicchoice2$total/1.127)*1000
```

```{r}
long_bee_preference_data_nicchoice2$Solution <- factor(long_bee_preference_data_nicchoice2$Solution, levels = c("S", "Q"))

vol_solution_nicchoice_boxplots <- ggplot(long_bee_preference_data_nicchoice2, aes(x = Solution, y = ul, fill = Solution)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.2, width = 0.5) + #color = "#820427") +  # Make boxplots transparent
  geom_jitter(data = filter(long_bee_preference_data_nicchoice2, !is_outlier),
            width = 0.05, size = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
  theme_minimal() + stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 3, aes(color = Solution)) +  # Mean as dot
  labs(title = "", x = "", y = "Total consumed (μl)") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("S" = "#5dade2", "Q" = "#F28C28")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("S" = "#5dade2", "Q" = "#F28C28")) +  
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 0),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 0),  # Align y-axis titles by removing x-axis title
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),  # y axis label size
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold")) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey", size = 0.8) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("S" = "S", "Q" = "N")) # Baseline at y=0

vol_solution_nicchoice_boxplots
```

Suc choice

```{r}
# Create a new dataframe with one row per bee and compute the preference index
bee_preference_data_succhoice <- blinds_ID[which(blinds_ID$Treatment == "Suc_choice" & blinds_ID$Notes == "Alive"),] %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID_numeric) %>%  # Group by bee ID and Treatment
  dplyr::summarize(
    total_Q = sum(Change_net[Solution == "N"], na.rm = TRUE),
    total_S = sum(Change_net[Solution == "S"], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    # Calculate preference index based on the treatment
    preference_index = (total_Q - total_S) / (total_Q + total_S))

bee_preference_data_succhoice <- bee_preference_data_succhoice %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Q1 = quantile(preference_index, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3 = quantile(preference_index, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = Q3 - Q1,
    is_outlier = preference_index < (Q1 - 1.5 * IQR) | preference_index > (Q3 + 1.5 * IQR))
```

Plot mass-based PI

```{r}
succhoice_mass_PI_bp <- ggplot(bee_preference_data_succhoice, aes(x = "", y = preference_index, fill = "")) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0, width = 1) +  # Make boxplots transparent
  geom_jitter(data = filter(bee_preference_data_succhoice, !is_outlier), aes(color = preference_index), width = 0.2, size = 1, alpha = 1) +  # Add jittered points
  theme_minimal() + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey", size = 0.8) +
  #geom_boxplot(width = 0.03, alpha = 0) + 
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 21, size = 3, color = "black") +  # Mean as a black dot
  labs(
    title = "Conventional 24h volume-based PI",
    x = "",
    y = "Preference index"
  ) +
  scale_color_gradient2(
    low = "#5dade2",   # Blue
    mid = "snow2",     # Neutral
    high = "#F28C28",  # Orange
    midpoint = 0,
    limits = c(-1, 1),
    name = "PI"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = "black") +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 0),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 0),  # Align y-axis titles by removing x-axis title
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),  # y axis label size
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold")) + ylim(c(-1,1))  # Baseline at y=0

succhoice_mass_PI_bp
```


Mass consumed of each solution
```{r}
bee_preference_data_succhoice2 <- bee_preference_data_succhoice %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Q1 = quantile(preference_index, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3 = quantile(preference_index, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = Q3 - Q1,
    is_outlier = preference_index < (Q1 - 1.5 * IQR) | preference_index > (Q3 + 1.5 * IQR))

long_bee_preference_data_succhoice2 <- bee_preference_data_succhoice2 %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(total_Q, total_S),
    names_to = "Solution",
    names_prefix = "total_",
    values_to = "total")
long_bee_preference_data_succhoice2$Solution <- as.factor(long_bee_preference_data_succhoice2$Solution)

long_bee_preference_data_succhoice2 <- long_bee_preference_data_succhoice2 %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Solution) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Q1 = quantile(total, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3 = quantile(total, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = Q3 - Q1,
    is_outlier = total < (Q1 - 1.5 * IQR) | total > (Q3 + 1.5 * IQR))

long_bee_preference_data_succhoice2$ul <- (long_bee_preference_data_succhoice2$total/1.127)*1000
```

```{r}
long_bee_preference_data_succhoice2$Solution <- factor(long_bee_preference_data_succhoice2$Solution, levels = c("S", "Q"))

vol_solution_succhoice_boxplots <- ggplot(long_bee_preference_data_succhoice2, aes(x = Solution, y = ul, fill = Solution)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.2, width = 0.5) + # Make boxplots transparent
  geom_jitter(data = filter(long_bee_preference_data_succhoice2, !is_outlier),
            width = 0.05, size = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
  theme_minimal() + stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 3, aes(color = Solution)) +  # Mean as dot
  labs(title = "", x = "", y = "Total consumed (μl)") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("S" = "#5dade2", "Q" = "#F28C28")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("S" = "#5dade2", "Q" = "#F28C28")) +  
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 0),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 0),  # Align y-axis titles by removing x-axis title
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),  # y axis label size
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold")) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey", size = 0.8) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("S" = "S", "Q" = "N")) # Baseline at y=0

vol_solution_succhoice_boxplots
```

No choice

```{r}
# Create a new dataframe with one row per bee and compute the preference index
bee_preference_data_nic_nochoice <- blinds_ID[which(blinds_ID$Treatment == "Nic_nochoice" & blinds_ID$Notes == "Alive"),] %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID_numeric) %>%  # Group by bee ID and Treatment
  dplyr::summarize(
    total_Q = sum(Change_net[Solution == "S1"], na.rm = TRUE),
    total_S = sum(Change_net[Solution == "S2"], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    # Calculate preference index based on the treatment
    preference_index = (total_Q - total_S) / (total_Q + total_S))

bee_preference_data_nic_nochoice <- bee_preference_data_nic_nochoice %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Q1 = quantile(preference_index, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3 = quantile(preference_index, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = Q3 - Q1,
    is_outlier = preference_index < (Q1 - 1.5 * IQR) | preference_index > (Q3 + 1.5 * IQR))
```

```{r}
nic_nochoice_mass_PI_bp <- ggplot(bee_preference_data_nic_nochoice, aes(x = "", y = preference_index, fill = "")) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0, width = 1) +  # Make boxplots transparent
  geom_jitter(data = filter(bee_preference_data_nic_nochoice, !is_outlier), aes(color = preference_index), width = 0.2, size = 1, alpha = 1) +  # Add jittered points
  theme_minimal() + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey", size = 0.8) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 21, size = 3, color = "black") +  # Mean as a black dot
  labs(
    title = "Conventional 24h volume-based PI",
    x = "",
    y = "Preference index") +
  scale_color_gradient2(
    low = "#5dade2",   # Blue
    mid = "snow2",     # Neutral
    high = "#5dade2",  # Orange
    midpoint = 0,
    limits = c(-1, 1),
    name = "PI") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = "black") +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 0),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 0),  # Align y-axis titles by removing x-axis title
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),  # y axis label size
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold")) + ylim(c(-1,1))

nic_nochoice_mass_PI_bp
```

Mass consumed of each solution
```{r}
bee_preference_data_nic_nochoice2 <- bee_preference_data_nic_nochoice %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Q1 = quantile(preference_index, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3 = quantile(preference_index, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = Q3 - Q1,
    is_outlier = preference_index < (Q1 - 1.5 * IQR) | preference_index > (Q3 + 1.5 * IQR))

long_bee_preference_data_nic_nochoice2 <- bee_preference_data_nic_nochoice2 %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(total_Q, total_S),
    names_to = "Solution",
    names_prefix = "total_",
    values_to = "total")
long_bee_preference_data_nic_nochoice2$Solution <- as.factor(long_bee_preference_data_nic_nochoice2$Solution)

long_bee_preference_data_nic_nochoice2 <- long_bee_preference_data_nic_nochoice2 %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Solution) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Q1 = quantile(total, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3 = quantile(total, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = Q3 - Q1,
    is_outlier = total < (Q1 - 1.5 * IQR) | total > (Q3 + 1.5 * IQR))

```

```{r}
long_bee_preference_data_nic_nochoice2$Solution <- factor(long_bee_preference_data_nic_nochoice2$Solution, levels = c("Q", "S"))

vol_solution_nic_nochoice_boxplots <- ggplot(long_bee_preference_data_nic_nochoice2, aes(x = Solution, y = ul, fill = Solution)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.2, width = 0.5) + #color = "#820427") +  # Make boxplots transparent
  geom_jitter(data = filter(long_bee_preference_data_nic_nochoice2, !is_outlier),
            width = 0.05, size = 1, alpha = 0.6) +

  labs(title = "", x = "", y = "Total consumed (μl)") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("S" = "#5dade2", "Q" = "#5dade2")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("S" = "#5dade2", "Q" = "#5dade2")) +  
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 0),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 0),  # Align y-axis titles by removing x-axis title
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),  # y axis label size
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold")) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey", size = 0.8) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("S" = "S2", "Q" = "S1")) # Baseline at y=0

vol_solution_nic_nochoice_boxplots
```

Statistical analysis

```{r}
bee_preference_data_nicchoice$bee_ID <- bee_preference_data_nicchoice$bee_ID_numeric
merged_df_nicchoice <- dplyr::left_join(all_end_pref_nicchoice, bee_preference_data_nicchoice, by = "bee_ID")
merged_df_nicchoice2 <- merged_df_nicchoice %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    PI_duration = quinine_PI_duration,
    PI_mass = preference_index) %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, PI_duration, PI_mass)

bee_preference_data_succhoice$bee_ID <- bee_preference_data_succhoice$bee_ID_numeric
merged_df_succhoice <- dplyr::left_join(all_end_pref_succhoice, bee_preference_data_succhoice, by = "bee_ID")
merged_df_succhoice2 <- merged_df_succhoice %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    PI_duration = quinine_PI_duration,
    PI_mass = preference_index) %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, PI_duration, PI_mass)

bee_preference_data_nic_nochoice$bee_ID <- bee_preference_data_nic_nochoice$bee_ID_numeric
merged_df_nochoice <- dplyr::left_join(all_end_pref_nicnochoice, bee_preference_data_nic_nochoice, by = "bee_ID")
merged_df_nochoice2 <- merged_df_nochoice %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    PI_duration = quinine_PI_duration,
    PI_mass = preference_index) %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, PI_duration, PI_mass)

# Add a treatment column to each dataframe
merged_df_nicchoice2 <- merged_df_nicchoice2 %>%
  dplyr::mutate(treatment = "nicchoice")
merged_df_succhoice2 <- merged_df_succhoice2 %>%
  dplyr::mutate(treatment = "succhoice")
merged_df_nochoice2 <- merged_df_nochoice2 %>%
  dplyr::mutate(treatment = "nochoice")
# Combine all three
combined <- bind_rows(merged_df_nicchoice2, merged_df_succhoice2, merged_df_nochoice2)
# Pivot longer to create a 'type' and 'PI' column
long_combined <- combined %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(PI_duration, PI_mass),
               names_to = "type",
               values_to = "PI") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(type = recode(type,
                       PI_duration = "duration",
                       PI_mass = "mass"))
```

```{r}
long_combined$type <- as.factor(long_combined$type)
long_combined$treatment <- as.factor(long_combined$treatment)

# Mixed model with random intercepts for bee_ID
library(lmerTest)
mod <- lmer(PI ~ treatment * type + (1 | bee_ID), data = long_combined)
anova(mod)

# Estimated marginal means
emm <- emmeans(mod, ~ treatment * type)
contrast(emm, method = "eff", adjust = "none")
contrast(emm, method = "eff", adjust = "fdr")

# Test if each group mean differs from 0
contrast(emm, method = "eff", adjust = "fdr")  # or adjust = "fdr" for less conservative correction
pairs(emmeans(mod, ~ type | treatment))

mod2 <- lmer(PI ~ treatment + type + (1 | bee_ID), data = long_combined)
car::Anova(mod2)
```

**************************************
# 6. Individual trajectories
**************************************

```{r}
binned_data_duration_nicchoice <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "Nic_choice" & all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Time_hrs <=24),] %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Time_hrs, Solution, seconds_fed, sip_frequency, mean_inter_sip_interval, Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Time_bin = cut_width(Time_hrs, width = 1, boundary = 0)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin, bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    max_total_duration = max(Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_sips = max(Cumulative_sips_overall_bee),
    av_sipfreq = mean(sip_frequency, na.rm = TRUE),
    number_feedingattempts = n(),
    av_inter_sip_interval = mean(mean_inter_sip_interval, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")

binned_data_duration_succhoice <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "Suc_choice" & all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Time_hrs <=24),] %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Time_hrs, Solution, seconds_fed, sip_frequency, mean_inter_sip_interval, Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Time_bin = cut_width(Time_hrs, width = 1, boundary = 0)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin, bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    max_total_duration = max(Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_sips = max(Cumulative_sips_overall_bee),
    av_sipfreq = mean(sip_frequency, na.rm = TRUE),
    number_feedingattempts = n(),
    av_inter_sip_interval = mean(mean_inter_sip_interval, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")

binned_data_duration_nic_nochoice <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "Nic_nochoice" & all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Time_hrs <=24),] %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Time_hrs, Solution, seconds_fed, sip_frequency, mean_inter_sip_interval, Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Time_bin = cut_width(Time_hrs, width = 1, boundary = 0)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin, bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    max_total_duration = max(Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_sips = max(Cumulative_sips_overall_bee),
    av_sipfreq = mean(sip_frequency, na.rm = TRUE),
    number_feedingattempts = n(),
    av_inter_sip_interval = mean(mean_inter_sip_interval, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")
```

## Nic choice

Fill in missing cumulative entries (if no bouts occurred for a given bee in a given time bin, add a row to the dataframe with 0s for the behaviours)
```{r}
# Create a reference grid of all combinations
bee_time_solution_grid_nicchoice <- binned_data_duration_nicchoice %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Time_bin, Solution)

# Expand to all combinations of bee_ID x Time_bin x Solution
full_data_nicchoice <- binned_data_duration_nicchoice %>%
  distinct(bee_ID) %>%
  crossing(
    Time_bin = unique(binned_data_duration_nicchoice$Time_bin),
    Solution = unique(binned_data_duration_nicchoice$Solution))

# Join original data into full grid
filled_data_nicchoice <- full_data_nicchoice %>%
  left_join(binned_data_duration_nicchoice, by = c("bee_ID", "Time_bin", "Solution")) %>%
  # Order for fill to work properly
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, Solution, Time_bin) %>%
  # Fill missing cumulative durations forward within each bee + solution
  group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_total_duration, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_sips, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(number_feedingattempts, .direction = "down") %>%
  # If it starts with missing (i.e., first bin), set to 0
  dplyr::mutate(max_total_duration = replace_na(max_total_duration, 0),
         max_sips = replace_na(max_sips, 0),
         number_feedingattempts = replace_na(number_feedingattempts, 0)) %>%
   # Step 1: lag previous total duration
  dplyr::mutate(prev_duration = lag(max_total_duration, default = 0),
                # Step 2: check if it increased
                new_attempt = if_else(max_total_duration > prev_duration, 1, 0),
                # Step 3: cumulative count only when duration increases
                cumulative_feedingattempts = cumsum(if_else(new_attempt == 1, number_feedingattempts, 0))) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(bee_ID) & bee_ID != "NA_NA") %>%
  ungroup()
```

Average cumulative duration, sips, and attempts within time bins and solutions

```{r}
binned_data_summary_nicchoice <- filled_data_nicchoice %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Time_bin_str = as.character(Time_bin),
    Time_bin_upper = as.numeric(sub(".*,(.*)\\)|.*,(.*)\\]", "\\1\\2", Time_bin_str))) 

binned_data_summary_nicchoice <- binned_data_summary_nicchoice %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin_upper, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(av_cumulative_duration = mean(max_total_duration),
                   av_cumulative_sips = mean(max_sips),
                   av_sip_frequency = mean(av_sipfreq, na.rm = TRUE),
                   av_cumulative_attempts = mean(cumulative_feedingattempts),
                   av_ISI = mean(av_inter_sip_interval),
                   .groups = "drop")
  
new_row <- data.frame(
  Time_bin_upper = 0,
  Solution = c("N", "S"),  # Add both solutions for Time_bin = 0
  av_cumulative_duration = 0,
  av_cumulative_sips = 0,
  av_cumulative_attempts = 0,
  av_sip_frequency = 0,
  av_ISI = 0)

binned_data_summary_nicchoice <- bind_rows(binned_data_summary_nicchoice, new_row) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper)

binned_data_summary_nicchoice <- binned_data_summary_nicchoice %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper) %>%  # Ensure the data is ordered by Solution and Time_bin_upper
  dplyr::group_by(Solution) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    av_duration_change = av_cumulative_duration - lag(av_cumulative_duration), #Do this for rate analysis 
    av_sips_change = av_cumulative_sips - lag(av_cumulative_sips),
    av_attempts_change = av_cumulative_attempts - lag(av_cumulative_attempts)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(av_duration_change = replace_na(av_duration_change, 0),
                av_sips_change = replace_na(av_sips_change, 0),
                av_attempts_change = replace_na(av_attempts_change, 0)) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
filled_data_nicchoice <- filled_data_nicchoice %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    total_seconds_fed = dplyr::if_else(
      Time_bin == "[0,1]",
      max_total_duration,
      max_total_duration - prev_duration))


filled_data_4h_nicchoice <- filled_data_nicchoice %>%
  # Extract lower bound of each bin
  dplyr::mutate(hour_start = as.numeric(str_extract(Time_bin, "\\d+"))) %>%
  # Create 4 h bins
  dplyr::mutate(
    bin_4h_start = floor(hour_start / 4) * 4,
      Time_bin_minutes = paste0(
      bin_4h_start * 60,
      "-",
      (bin_4h_start + 4) * 60)) %>%
  # Sum feeding time within 4 h bins
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution, Time_bin_minutes) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    total_seconds_fed = sum(total_seconds_fed, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")

filled_data_4h_nicchoice <- filled_data_4h_nicchoice %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    bin_start_min = as.numeric(str_extract(Time_bin_minutes, "^\\d+"))) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, Solution, bin_start_min)
```

```{r}
final_totals_nicchoice <- filled_data_4h_nicchoice %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(total = sum(total_seconds_fed), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = total,
    values_fill = 0) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(total_experiment = N + S)

indiv_pref_trajectories_nicchoice <- filled_data_4h_nicchoice %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = total_seconds_fed,
    values_fill = 0) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, bin_start_min) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    cumulative_N = cumsum(N),
    cumulative_S = cumsum(S),
    PI_cumul_1 = cumulative_N - cumulative_S,
    PI_cumul_3 = (cumulative_N - cumulative_S) / (cumulative_N + cumulative_S))

indiv_pref_trajectories_nicchoice <- indiv_pref_trajectories_nicchoice %>%
  left_join(final_totals_nicchoice, by = "bee_ID") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    PI_cumul_2 = (cumulative_N - cumulative_S) / total_experiment) %>%
  ungroup()

bin_width <- 240
# Extract time_bin midpoint for plotting
indiv_pref_trajectories_nicchoice <- indiv_pref_trajectories_nicchoice %>%
  dplyr::mutate(midpoint = as.numeric(str_extract(Time_bin_minutes, "\\d+$")) - (bin_width/2))

# Add a starting point at (0, 0) for each bee
start_points_nicchoice <- indiv_pref_trajectories_nicchoice %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 1) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(midpoint = 0, cumulative_N = 0, cumulative_S = 0, PI_cumul_1 = 0, PI_cumul_2 = 0, PI_cumul_3 = 0)

# Combine starting points with cumulative data
plot_data_nicchoice <- bind_rows(start_points_nicchoice, indiv_pref_trajectories_nicchoice) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, midpoint)
```

```{r}
average_data_nicchoice <- plot_data_nicchoice[which(plot_data_nicchoice$total_experiment>=10),] %>%#plot_data_quinine[which(plot_data_quinine$bee_ID != 9 & plot_data_quinine$bee_ID != 31),] %>%
  dplyr::group_by(midpoint) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(mean_PI_cumul_1 = mean(PI_cumul_1, na.rm = TRUE),
                   mean_PI_cumul_2 = mean(PI_cumul_2, na.rm = TRUE),
                   mean_PI_cumul_3 = mean(PI_cumul_3, na.rm = TRUE))
```

Continuous colour at start and smooth colouration of big jumps
```{r}
end_values_nicchoice <- plot_data_nicchoice[which(plot_data_nicchoice$total_experiment>=10),] %>%
  dplyr::filter(midpoint == 120) %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, PI_cumul_2) %>%
  filter(is.finite(PI_cumul_2))

n_steps <- 100

manual_segments_nicchoice <- end_values_nicchoice %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  reframe(
    midpoint = seq(0, 120, length.out = n_steps),
    PI_cumul_2 = seq(0, PI_cumul_2, length.out = n_steps))
```

```{r}
nicchoice_indiv_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_nicchoice[which(plot_data_nicchoice$total_experiment>=10),], aes(x = midpoint, y = PI_cumul_2, group = bee_ID)) +
  geom_line(size = 0.8, alpha = 1, aes(color = PI_cumul_2)) +
geom_line(
  data = manual_segments_nicchoice,
  aes(x = midpoint, y = PI_cumul_2, group = bee_ID, color = PI_cumul_2, alpha = 1),
  inherit.aes = FALSE,
  size = 0.8) + 
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 1440, by = 240),
    labels = function(x) x / 60 ) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black") + # Horizontal line at y=0
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray80", color = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "none",  # Remove legend for individual lines
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold")) + scale_color_gradient2(
    low = "#5dade2",   # Red
    mid = "snow2",     # Neutral
    high = "#f28c28",  # Green 00A86B; #FDDA0D caffeine; 643B9F scopolamine
    midpoint = 0,      # Set the midpoint to 0
    limits = c(-1, 1), # Adjust the limits based on the range of cumulative_net
    name = "PI")  + ylim(c(-1, 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Cumulative net consumption of focal solution over time",
    x = "Time (h)",
    y = "Cumulative net consumption (N - S)",
  ) + geom_smooth(data = average_data_nicchoice, aes(x = midpoint, y = mean_PI_cumul_2), inherit.aes = FALSE, method = "loess", lty = "dashed", color = "#bf3737", fill = "gray70", alpha = 0.4, se = FALSE)

nicchoice_indiv_plot
```

## Suc choice

Fill in missing cumulative entries (if no bouts occurred for a given bee in a given time bin, add a row to the dataframe with 0s for the behaviours)
```{r}
# Create a reference grid of all combinations
bee_time_solution_grid <- binned_data_duration_succhoice %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Time_bin, Solution)

# Expand to all combinations of bee_ID x Time_bin x Solution
full_data_succhoice <- binned_data_duration_succhoice %>%
  distinct(bee_ID) %>%
  crossing(
    Time_bin = unique(binned_data_duration_succhoice$Time_bin),
    Solution = unique(binned_data_duration_succhoice$Solution))

# Join original data into full grid
filled_data_succhoice <- full_data_succhoice %>%
  left_join(binned_data_duration_succhoice, by = c("bee_ID", "Time_bin", "Solution")) %>%
  # Order for fill to work properly
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, Solution, Time_bin) %>%
  # Fill missing cumulative durations forward within each bee + solution
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_total_duration, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_sips, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(number_feedingattempts, .direction = "down") %>%
  # If it starts with missing (i.e., first bin), set to 0
  dplyr::mutate(max_total_duration = replace_na(max_total_duration, 0),
         max_sips = replace_na(max_sips, 0),
         number_feedingattempts = replace_na(number_feedingattempts, 0)) %>%
   # Step 1: lag previous total duration
  dplyr::mutate(prev_duration = lag(max_total_duration, default = 0),
                # Step 2: check if it increased
                new_attempt = if_else(max_total_duration > prev_duration, 1, 0),
                # Step 3: cumulative count only when duration increases
                cumulative_feedingattempts = cumsum(if_else(new_attempt == 1, number_feedingattempts, 0))) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(bee_ID) & bee_ID != "NA_NA") %>%
  ungroup()
```

Average cumulative duration, sips, and attempts within time bins and solutions
```{r}
binned_data_summary_succhoice <- filled_data_succhoice %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Time_bin_str = as.character(Time_bin),
    Time_bin_upper = as.numeric(sub(".*,(.*)\\)|.*,(.*)\\]", "\\1\\2", Time_bin_str))) 

binned_data_summary_succhoice <- binned_data_summary_succhoice %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin_upper, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(av_cumulative_duration = mean(max_total_duration),
                   av_cumulative_sips = mean(max_sips),
                   av_sip_frequency = mean(av_sipfreq, na.rm = TRUE),
                   av_cumulative_attempts = mean(cumulative_feedingattempts),
                   av_ISI = mean(av_inter_sip_interval),
                   .groups = "drop")
  
new_row <- data.frame(
  Time_bin_upper = 0,
  Solution = c("N", "S"),  # Add both solutions for Time_bin = 0
  av_cumulative_duration = 0,
  av_cumulative_sips = 0,
  av_cumulative_attempts = 0,
  av_sip_frequency = 0,
  av_ISI = 0)

binned_data_summary_succhoice <- bind_rows(binned_data_summary_succhoice, new_row) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper)

binned_data_summary_succhoice <- binned_data_summary_succhoice %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper) %>%  # Ensure the data is ordered by Solution and Time_bin_upper
  dplyr::group_by(Solution) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    av_duration_change = av_cumulative_duration - lag(av_cumulative_duration), #Do this for rate analysis 
    av_sips_change = av_cumulative_sips - lag(av_cumulative_sips),
    av_attempts_change = av_cumulative_attempts - lag(av_cumulative_attempts)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(av_duration_change = replace_na(av_duration_change, 0),
                av_sips_change = replace_na(av_sips_change, 0),
                av_attempts_change = replace_na(av_attempts_change, 0)) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
filled_data_succhoice <- filled_data_succhoice %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    total_seconds_fed = dplyr::if_else(
      Time_bin == "[0,1]",
      max_total_duration,
      max_total_duration - prev_duration))


filled_data_4h_succhoice <- filled_data_succhoice %>%
  # Extract lower bound of each bin
  dplyr::mutate(hour_start = as.numeric(str_extract(Time_bin, "\\d+"))) %>%
  # Create 4 h bins
  dplyr::mutate(
    bin_4h_start = floor(hour_start / 4) * 4,
      Time_bin_minutes = paste0(
      bin_4h_start * 60,
      "-",
      (bin_4h_start + 4) * 60)) %>%
  # Sum feeding time within 4 h bins
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution, Time_bin_minutes) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    total_seconds_fed = sum(total_seconds_fed, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")

filled_data_4h_succhoice <- filled_data_4h_succhoice %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    bin_start_min = as.numeric(str_extract(Time_bin_minutes, "^\\d+"))) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, Solution, bin_start_min)
```

```{r}
final_totals_succhoice <- filled_data_4h_succhoice %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(total = sum(total_seconds_fed), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = total,
    values_fill = 0) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(total_experiment = N + S)

indiv_pref_trajectories_succhoice <- filled_data_4h_succhoice %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = total_seconds_fed,
    values_fill = 0) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, bin_start_min) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    cumulative_N = cumsum(N),
    cumulative_S = cumsum(S),
    PI_cumul_1 = cumulative_N - cumulative_S,
    PI_cumul_3 = (cumulative_N - cumulative_S) / (cumulative_N + cumulative_S))

indiv_pref_trajectories_succhoice <- indiv_pref_trajectories_succhoice %>%
  left_join(final_totals_succhoice, by = "bee_ID") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    PI_cumul_2 = (cumulative_N - cumulative_S) / total_experiment) %>%
  ungroup()

bin_width <- 240
# Extract time_bin midpoint for plotting
indiv_pref_trajectories_succhoice <- indiv_pref_trajectories_succhoice %>%
  dplyr::mutate(midpoint = as.numeric(str_extract(Time_bin_minutes, "\\d+$")) - (bin_width/2))

# Add a starting point at (0, 0) for each bee
start_points_succhoice <- indiv_pref_trajectories_succhoice %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 1) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(midpoint = 0, cumulative_N = 0, cumulative_S = 0, PI_cumul_1 = 0, PI_cumul_2 = 0, PI_cumul_3 = 0)

# Combine starting points with cumulative data
plot_data_succhoice <- bind_rows(start_points_succhoice, indiv_pref_trajectories_succhoice) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, midpoint)
```

```{r}
average_data_succhoice <- plot_data_succhoice[which(plot_data_succhoice$total_experiment>=10),] %>%#plot_data_quinine[which(plot_data_quinine$bee_ID != 9 & plot_data_quinine$bee_ID != 31),] %>%
  dplyr::group_by(midpoint) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(mean_PI_cumul_1 = mean(PI_cumul_1, na.rm = TRUE),
                   mean_PI_cumul_2 = mean(PI_cumul_2, na.rm = TRUE),
                   mean_PI_cumul_3 = mean(PI_cumul_3, na.rm = TRUE))
```

Continuous colour at start and smooth colouration of big jumps
```{r}
end_values_succhoice <- plot_data_succhoice[which(plot_data_succhoice$total_experiment>=10),] %>%
  dplyr::filter(midpoint == 120) %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, PI_cumul_2) %>%
  filter(is.finite(PI_cumul_2))

n_steps <- 100

manual_segments_succhoice <- end_values_succhoice %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  reframe(
    midpoint = seq(0, 120, length.out = n_steps),
    PI_cumul_2 = seq(0, PI_cumul_2, length.out = n_steps))
```

```{r}
succhoice_indiv_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_succhoice[which(plot_data_succhoice$total_experiment>=10),], aes(x = midpoint, y = PI_cumul_2, group = bee_ID)) +
  geom_line(size = 0.8, alpha = 1, aes(color = PI_cumul_2)) +
geom_line(
  data = manual_segments_succhoice,
  aes(x = midpoint, y = PI_cumul_2, group = bee_ID, color = PI_cumul_2, alpha = 1),
  inherit.aes = FALSE,
  size = 0.8) + 
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 1440, by = 240),
    labels = function(x) x / 60) +   # Divide y-values by 60
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black") + # Horizontal line at y=0
  theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray80", color = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "none",  # Remove legend for individual lines
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold")) + scale_color_gradient2(
    low = "#5dade2",   # Red
    mid = "snow2",     # Neutral
    high = "#f28c28",  # Green 00A86B; #FDDA0D caffeine; 643B9F scopolamine
    midpoint = 0,      # Set the midpoint to 0
    limits = c(-1, 1), # Adjust the limits based on the range of cumulative_net
    name = "PI")  + ylim(c(-1, 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Cumulative net consumption of focal solution over time",
    x = "Time (h)",
    y = "Cumulative net consumption (N - S)",
  ) + geom_smooth(data = average_data_succhoice, aes(x = midpoint, y = mean_PI_cumul_2), inherit.aes = FALSE, method = "loess", lty = "dashed", color = "#d0d044", fill = "gray70", alpha = 0.4, se = FALSE)

succhoice_indiv_plot
```

## Nic no choice

**Fill in missing cumulative entries (if no bouts occurred for a given bee in a given time bin, add a row to the dataframe with 0s for the behaviours)
```{r}
# Create a reference grid of all combinations
bee_time_solution_grid <- binned_data_duration_nic_nochoice %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Time_bin, Solution)

# Expand to all combinations of bee_ID x Time_bin x Solution
full_data_nic_nochoice <- binned_data_duration_nic_nochoice %>%
  distinct(bee_ID) %>%
  crossing(
    Time_bin = unique(binned_data_duration_nic_nochoice$Time_bin),
    Solution = unique(binned_data_duration_nic_nochoice$Solution))

# Join original data into full grid
filled_data_nic_nochoice <- full_data_nic_nochoice %>%
  left_join(binned_data_duration_nic_nochoice, by = c("bee_ID", "Time_bin", "Solution")) %>%
  # Order for fill to work properly
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, Solution, Time_bin) %>%
  # Fill missing cumulative durations forward within each bee + solution
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_total_duration, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_sips, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(number_feedingattempts, .direction = "down") %>%
  # If it starts with missing (i.e., first bin), set to 0
  dplyr::mutate(max_total_duration = replace_na(max_total_duration, 0),
         max_sips = replace_na(max_sips, 0),
         number_feedingattempts = replace_na(number_feedingattempts, 0)) %>%
   # Step 1: lag previous total duration
  dplyr::mutate(prev_duration = lag(max_total_duration, default = 0),
                # Step 2: check if it increased
                new_attempt = if_else(max_total_duration > prev_duration, 1, 0),
                # Step 3: cumulative count only when duration increases
                cumulative_feedingattempts = cumsum(if_else(new_attempt == 1, number_feedingattempts, 0))) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(bee_ID) & bee_ID != "NA_NA") %>%
  ungroup()
```

Average cumulative duration, sips, and attempts within time bins and solutions
```{r}
binned_data_summary_nic_nochoice <- filled_data_nic_nochoice %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Time_bin_str = as.character(Time_bin),
    Time_bin_upper = as.numeric(sub(".*,(.*)\\)|.*,(.*)\\]", "\\1\\2", Time_bin_str))) 

binned_data_summary_nic_nochoice <- binned_data_summary_nic_nochoice %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin_upper, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(av_cumulative_duration = mean(max_total_duration),
                   av_cumulative_sips = mean(max_sips),
                   av_sip_frequency = mean(av_sipfreq, na.rm = TRUE),
                   av_cumulative_attempts = mean(cumulative_feedingattempts),
                   av_ISI = mean(av_inter_sip_interval),
                   .groups = "drop")
  
new_row_nic_nochoice <- data.frame(
  Time_bin_upper = 0,
  Solution = c("S1", "S2"),  # Add both solutions for Time_bin = 0
  av_cumulative_duration = 0,
  av_cumulative_sips = 0,
  av_cumulative_attempts = 0,
  av_sip_frequency = 0,
  av_ISI = 0)

binned_data_summary_nic_nochoice <- bind_rows(binned_data_summary_nic_nochoice, new_row_nic_nochoice) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper)

binned_data_summary_nic_nochoice <- binned_data_summary_nic_nochoice %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper) %>%  # Ensure the data is ordered by Solution and Time_bin_upper
  dplyr::group_by(Solution) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    av_duration_change = av_cumulative_duration - lag(av_cumulative_duration), #Do this for rate analysis 
    av_sips_change = av_cumulative_sips - lag(av_cumulative_sips),
    av_attempts_change = av_cumulative_attempts - lag(av_cumulative_attempts)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(av_duration_change = replace_na(av_duration_change, 0),
                av_sips_change = replace_na(av_sips_change, 0),
                av_attempts_change = replace_na(av_attempts_change, 0)) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
filled_data_nic_nochoice <- filled_data_nic_nochoice %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    total_seconds_fed = dplyr::if_else(
      Time_bin == "[0,1]",
      max_total_duration,
      max_total_duration - prev_duration))

filled_data_4h_nic_nochoice <- filled_data_nic_nochoice %>%
  # Extract lower bound of each bin
  dplyr::mutate(hour_start = as.numeric(str_extract(Time_bin, "\\d+"))) %>%
  # Create 4 h bins
  dplyr::mutate(
    bin_4h_start = floor(hour_start / 4) * 4,
      Time_bin_minutes = paste0(
      bin_4h_start * 60,
      "-",
      (bin_4h_start + 4) * 60)) %>%
  # Sum feeding time within 4 h bins
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution, Time_bin_minutes) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    total_seconds_fed = sum(total_seconds_fed, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")

filled_data_4h_nic_nochoice <- filled_data_4h_nic_nochoice %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    bin_start_min = as.numeric(str_extract(Time_bin_minutes, "^\\d+"))) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, Solution, bin_start_min)
```

```{r}
final_totals_nic_nochoice <- filled_data_4h_nic_nochoice %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(total = sum(total_seconds_fed), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = total,
    values_fill = 0) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(total_experiment = S1 + S2)

indiv_pref_trajectories_nic_nochoice <- filled_data_4h_nic_nochoice %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = total_seconds_fed,
    values_fill = 0) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, bin_start_min) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    cumulative_S1 = cumsum(S1),
    cumulative_S2 = cumsum(S2),
    PI_cumul_1 = cumulative_S1 - cumulative_S2,
    PI_cumul_3 = (cumulative_S1 - cumulative_S2) / (cumulative_S1 + cumulative_S2))

indiv_pref_trajectories_nic_nochoice <- indiv_pref_trajectories_nic_nochoice %>%
  left_join(final_totals_nic_nochoice, by = "bee_ID") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    PI_cumul_2 = (cumulative_S1 - cumulative_S2) / total_experiment) %>%
  ungroup()

bin_width <- 240
# Extract time_bin midpoint for plotting
indiv_pref_trajectories_nic_nochoice <- indiv_pref_trajectories_nic_nochoice %>%
  dplyr::mutate(midpoint = as.numeric(str_extract(Time_bin_minutes, "\\d+$")) - (bin_width/2))

# Add a starting point at (0, 0) for each bee
start_points_nic_nochoice <- indiv_pref_trajectories_nic_nochoice %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 1) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(midpoint = 0, cumulative_S1 = 0, cumulative_S2 = 0, PI_cumul_1 = 0, PI_cumul_2 = 0, PI_cumul_3 = 0)

# Combine starting points with cumulative data
plot_data_nic_nochoice <- bind_rows(start_points_nic_nochoice, indiv_pref_trajectories_nic_nochoice) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, midpoint)
```

```{r}
average_data_nic_nochoice <- plot_data_nic_nochoice[which(plot_data_nic_nochoice$total_experiment>=10),] %>%
  dplyr::group_by(midpoint) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(mean_PI_cumul_1 = mean(PI_cumul_1, na.rm = TRUE),
                   mean_PI_cumul_2 = mean(PI_cumul_2, na.rm = TRUE),
                   mean_PI_cumul_3 = mean(PI_cumul_3, na.rm = TRUE))
```

Continuous colour at start and smooth colouration of big jumps
```{r}
end_values_nic_nochoice <- plot_data_nic_nochoice[which(plot_data_nic_nochoice$total_experiment>=10),] %>%
  dplyr::filter(midpoint == 120) %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, PI_cumul_2) %>%
  filter(is.finite(PI_cumul_2))

n_steps <- 100

manual_segments_nic_nochoice <- end_values_nic_nochoice %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  reframe(
    midpoint = seq(0, 120, length.out = n_steps),
    PI_cumul_2 = seq(0, PI_cumul_2, length.out = n_steps))
```

```{r}
nic_nochoice_indiv_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_nic_nochoice[which(plot_data_nic_nochoice$total_experiment>=10),], aes(x = midpoint, y = PI_cumul_2, group = bee_ID)) +
  geom_line(size = 0.8, alpha = 1, aes(color = PI_cumul_2)) +
geom_line(
  data = manual_segments_nic_nochoice,
  aes(x = midpoint, y = PI_cumul_2, group = bee_ID, color = PI_cumul_2, alpha = 1),
  inherit.aes = FALSE,
  size = 0.8) + 
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 1440, by = 240),
    labels = function(x) x / 60  # Divide y-values by 60
) +  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black") + # Horizontal line at y=0
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray80", color = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "none",  # Remove legend for individual lines
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold")
  ) + scale_color_gradient2(
    low = "#5dade2",   # Red
    mid = "snow2",     # Neutral
    high = "#5dade2",  # Green 00A86B; #FDDA0D caffeine; 643B9F scopolamine
    midpoint = 0,      # Set the midpoint to 0
    limits = c(-1, 1), # Adjust the limits based on the range of cumulative_net
    name = "PI")  + ylim(c(-1, 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Cumulative net consumption of focal solution over time",
    x = "Time (h)",
    y = "Cumulative net consumption (N - S)",) + 
  geom_smooth(data = average_data_nic_nochoice, aes(x = midpoint, y = mean_PI_cumul_2), inherit.aes = FALSE, method = "loess", lty = "dashed", color = "#148cb4", fill = "gray70", alpha = 0.4, se = FALSE)

nic_nochoice_indiv_plot
```
